programme.desc: Caroline finds herself being sued for negligence in civil court by the angry and bitter mother of a drowning victim. CJ babysits a neighbor’s newborn and realizes she wants to be a mother. But is Cody ready to be a father?

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: CJ and Cody transport an injured sea lion to the animal recovery facility at Sea World. While there, Samantha gets the idea to promote lifeguarding by planning a Baywatch-theme stunt show at Sea World.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A crazed young woman is causing trouble on the Venice Boardwalk and Neely suspects it is more than meets the eye. Meanwhile, Newman meets his dream woman – who doesn’t speak English.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A mysterious, disfigured man whom the public dubs "the phantom lifeguard," is secretly saving people and sending love notes to CJ. When CJ goes missing the team sets out to find her and the “phantom.”

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Young, ambitious and sexy lifeguard candidates compete for a chance to attend Rookie School. Mitch is offered a promotion to Captain and has a tough decision to make. Lani McKensie faces the sinister return of a former lover.

programme.title: Bellator 178: Straus vs Pitbull 4
programme.desc: Bellator MMA takes place from Mohegan Sun in Connecticut featuring a featherweight world title fight between Patricio Pitbull and Daniel Straus in the fourth chapter of their storied rivalry. Also, AJ McKee and Ilima-Lei Macfarlane return to action.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to London with a stacked card featuring a showdown between top welterweights Paul “Semtex” Daley and Rory MacDonald, along with appearanc-es from Michael “MVP” Page, Cheick Kongo, Baby Slice and Liam McGeary.

programme.title: Bellator NYC: Sonnen vs Silva
programme.desc: Bellator MMA invades Madison Square Garden in NY with a blockbuster card. Chael Sonnen and Wanderlei Silva in a long-awaited grudge match. The double main event also sees Fedor Emelianenko taking on Matt Mitrione. Also, Douglas Lima and Michael Chandler!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is live with its biggest show ever from Madison Square Garden featuring new signee Ryan Bader taking on Champ Phil Davis for the Light Heavyweight belt. Irish phenom James Gallagher taking on KO artist Chinzo Machida.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA takes place in Thackerville, Oklahoma with a rubber match between two veteran standouts as Brandon Girtz meets Derek Campos in a main event sure to produce fireworks! The stacked card also features fights with Joe Warren and Kendall Grove.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is from Verona, New York with a Middleweight showdown as Chidi Njokuani takes on former champ Andrey Koreshkov. Heavy-handed Brennan Ward will face off against Fernando Gonzalez in the co-main slot.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes home to San Jose, California with a collision between top lightweights as Patricky Pitbull meets Benson Henderson. Plus the Bellator debut of Roy “Big Country” Nelson when he faces hard-hitting Javy Ayala in a heavyweight battle.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Thackerville as Eduardo Dantas puts his Bantamweight world title on the line against Darrion Caldwell. This stacked fight card also features Daniel Straus taking on Emmanuel Sanchez and Pat Curran facing off against John Macapa.

programme.title: Bellator 185: Mousasi vs. Shlemenko
programme.desc: The elite two-division threat, Gegard Mousasi makes his Bellator debut against former Middleweight Champion Alexander Shlemenko who is on a five-fight win streak.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Penn State as accomplished alumni Phil Davis and Ed Ruth return to their roots. Light Heavyweight Champ Ryan Bader defends his belt. Plus Ilima-Lei Macfarlane and Emily Ducote clash for the inaugural flyweight world title!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mary says husband Jesse is abusive, unfaithful, controlling & she feels she's living in a prison. Jesse says he's not controlling, he's just "containing the beast," & his wife needs to abide by his rules if she wants to stay married. Dr. Sophy steps in.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jason & Shady have a blended family on the verge of falling apart. After knowing each other 2 months & meeting in person 1 time, they married. Each brought children into their new home & with seven kids under one roof, life isn't what anyone expected.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: There have been no answers to the whereabouts of Summer Wells, 5, missing since 2021. Parents Don & Candus say it backfired by requesting the public's help. In this exclusive first national TV interview, Dr. Phil digs deeper into the story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Continuing with Danielle & Brandon, who are involved in a custody battle. Accusations involving the Sheriff over a sports drink & CPS sent to a wedding rehearsal dinner--Dr. Phil tells the parents how to create a peaceful environment for their child.Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil had asked Ted Williams the hard questions about sobriety & avoiding the pitfalls of sudden success. After an emotional family reunion for Ted & several family members abandoned by him more than 20 years ago. Ted is next confronted with rehab.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Libby & Brian are at war over custody of their two young children. Get a behind-the-scenes look at what made Dr. Phil consider canceling the show & learn why he refused to allow these exes on his stage! Don't miss the backstage drama on today's Dr. Phil!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Affairs, fights, lies & dark secrets have divided family & friends. Brandon, a handsome, charming firefighter, has an ugly secret. One year into his marriage to Amy, he was caught cheating with their teenage nanny. Yet Brandon filed for divorce? Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez's fiancée, Shayanna Jenkins-Hernandez, speaks on the football star's prison suicide. She reveals their last phone call, what she thinks about his suicide note, & sheds light on the former New England Patriots' mindset. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Julianne says Leighton "lied his way through life" & turned daughter, Mariah, into a liar & con artist. In a tense in-studio showdown, Julianne and couple face-off. Hotel security was called before the show, & what happened after arriving to the studio?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: One of the most asked about guests on Dr. Phil returns--Brandon! Plus, a desperate family turns to Dr. Phil to save their daughter who is addicted to OxyContin and heroin.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pageant mom Lori & daugther Alaska, 9, made news bleaching the girl's teeth & dyeing her eyelashes. Alaska's pic posted on TheDirty.com, with a man's claim he performed a sexual act while looking at the photo. Plus, Brittany, 21, had sex with a 14-yr-old.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: After former friends Randi & Haley tell Brittany's history of harassing men & faking pregnancies, Dr. Phil talks to Brittany and asks her to prove she is pregnant. What sent Brittany storming off stage? See the backstage conversation with Dr. Phil.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ted Williams was living on the streets in Columbus, Ohio, his life ruined by substance abuse. Ted became an overnight celebrity after The Columbus Dispatch posted a web video.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with husband and wife, Nathan and April, who claim a woman named Ashley is fixated on their beautiful twin daughters and continuously posts pictures of them online, posing as their mother! How will Ashley react when confronted? Pt. 2

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Making The Cut" Judge Nicole Richie updates Drew on her bearded dragon Speedy, the birthday trauma they've both experienced and what it's really like working with Heidi Klum.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The hosts of "The Talk" continue their Drew's News takeover and hitting today's hottest headlines like the woman who threw a party and invited sixty-five of her dating app matches.

programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are covering today's hottest headlines with an all-new Drew's News, plus they've got sloths at the news desk!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Barefoot Contessa Ina Garten joins Drew for the entire show! Ina shares with Drew her disastrous first date with husband of 54 -years Jeffrey, his love notes and some of his text messages going astray!

programme.desc: Drew-crew member Danny Seo is back and sharing professional laundry tips with Drew andKerry Washington, including how to get makeup stains out of sheets.Drew and Ross Mathews are at the Drew's News desk and covering the hottest topics.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale's downtrodden bank secretaries organize to fight for better wages and working conditions.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and Elly May join the Women's Liberation Movement and leave all the household chores to Jed and Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbilly ladies move out of the Clampett mansion but Jed and Jethro replace them with a trio of Japanese beauties.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro leaves home when he learns his ugly childhood sweetheart is coming for a visit, not knowing she has become a beauty contest winner.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Dick Bremerkamp, a penniless actor, learns the Clampetts are millionaires and begins romancing Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A fortune-hunting young man decides to amrry into the hillbilly family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jane Hathaway learns her new boyfriend is a fortune-hunter who would like to marry Elly May and her family's millions.

programme.title: A Very Beverly Hillbillies Christmas
programme.desc: Join the Clampett family as they take the Christmas traditions of the Ozarks all the way to the uptight mansions of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett is told by a representative of an oil company that the swamp behind his shack is full of oil.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts begin to settle in their new home in Beverly Hills, California.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: While Granny boils pool water for washing due to the "lack of a pump" and Elly May gets a feminine make-over by Miss Hathaway, cousin Pearl is back at the cabin making eyes with the visiting oil man while he gives her a ride to the nearest phone.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale panics when Mrs. Drysdale comes back from Boston early because she'll meet the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to go home because folks are so unfriendly no one has come to call.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks Jed into taking in his butler and upstairs girl in a plan to civilize the Clampetts, but they don't quite understand the idea of servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale convinces his self-absorbed stepson Sonny to date Elly May to Mrs. Drysdale's consternation, while Granny and Jed make preparations for Thanksgiving

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed, Ellie May, Jethro, and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Back home for Christmas, Elly May bonds with her old animal friends, while Pearl plays the piano for the "new" movie in town (the silent version of Ben Hur) to impress Mr. Brewster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts pack up to return to Beverly Hills, so Jethrine tries to pack Jazzbo Depew. Elly says goodbye to her animals

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S04E014) Donna and David celebrate their first year together. Dylan and Kelly get back together, while Andrea falls in love with a new boyfriend.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: As Ryan tries to keep the morale of 9MAG high, the future of 2nd City lies in the balance as coronavirus makes its rounds in Chicago. Jess and Steven jet back to London. Don & Ashley are forced to make decisions on the future of their marriage.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: As the darkness of the pandemic recedes, the crew of Black Ink Chicago looks to the future while being forced to face the past. Business at 9MAG has never been better, even though Ryan's life is in disarray, while Charmaine has a new baby and job.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Ryan faces off with a close friend who feels he committed the ultimate betrayal. Kitty begins her tenure at 2nd City Ink. Even with a baby on the way, Phor tries to put the brakes on his relationship with Nina, only to have to deal with her mother.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: As Nina, stuck at the apartment and eight months pregnant, waits for Phor to get home, she finally decides to pack up her things and move out. Phor asks the 9MAG guys for advice and seeks solace in his music, spending more late nights at the studio.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Both 9MAG and 2nd City gear up for the Chicago Tattoo Convention, while goodbyes and new beginnings loom over the Crew. Draya and Kitty become closer allies when Charmaine continues to struggle with managing 2nd City Ink while caring for her sick father.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: 2nd City and 9MAG participate in the Chicago Tattoo Convention, but tempers flare when ex-2nd City employees, Draya and Kitty, show up, creating conflict for Charmaine. Ryan plays peacemaker, but this comes at the cost of a personal relationship.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: After the dysfunction at 2nd City Ink was put on display at the convention, the crew is scrambling to understand what happened and if the situation can be fixed. Meanwhile, Ryan is welcoming a new artist to 9MAG and searching for answers of his own.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Self-care is what it's all about as Ryan steps away from 9MAG to take part in an intensive therapy retreat, Don throws a community health fair, and Charmaine is faced with another family tragedy.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Neek tries to brighten Charmaine's spirits after losing her father by arranging a surprise picnic for their fifth anniversary. Charmaine reveals some big news. Ryan, fresh out of therapy and feeling brand new, approaches leadership at 9MAG with new vigor.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Attitudes fly, and feats of strength are tested when the members of 9MAG and 2nd City Ink attend a team bonding trip hosted by Ryan, who wants to rectify the last family dinner disaster. Meanwhile, not everyone wants to play on Charmaine's team.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Tempers flare as old beefs resurface at Char's new product launch. Nina and Phor work to put Phorever first, and Prince struggles with a choice offered and a choice made.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: With more and more artists joining 9MAG, Ryan comes back as focused as ever on his growing shop. Charmaine cleans house at 2nd City and implements new restrictions that leave the crew at 9MAG wondering "What's going on with Charmaine?

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Don and Phor worry that Ryan might see their growth outside of the shop as disloyalty. As Draya settles into 9MAG, she finds out you can't run from all of your problems. Shogun throws a party to welcome all the new artists.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Ryan confronts his grandmother's passing and realizes he's been spread too thin between work and family. As several mysterious encounters with the ghost of 9MAG start to worry the crew, Draya invites a medium to the shop to clear the air.

programme.title: Half & Half
programme.desc: Mona discovers everyone is hanging out with Chase behind her back. Gus leaves town, leaving Brett in charge of the office. But when Dee Dee's colleagues tell her he is envious of her new responsibilities she tries to keep the peace in the office.

programme.title: Half & Half
programme.desc: In an effort to make up her mind once and for all, Mona decides she wants to date both Chase and Lorenzo. When both men agree she finds herself more confused then ever.

programme.title: Half & Half
programme.desc: Dee Dee attempts to get closer to Mona by planning a joint birthday party reminding Mona of bad memories from their childhood

programme.desc: In an attempt to gain Mona’s respect, Dee Dee gets a waitressing job to prove that she can be independent

programme.desc: Dee Dee starts dating a guy who, as it turns out, was Mona’s ex-high school boyfriend and her first.

programme.desc: Coach Thurman witnesses Chris being bullied by Caruso and suggests Chris learn to box to defend himself.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Dentro y fuera
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un líder de pandilla, Danny y Baez descubren que el presunto asesino es un ex convicto que tiene una relación romántica con su oficial de libertad condicional, quien podría estar ayudando a encubrir el crimen.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Almas perdidas
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un conductor ebrio que mató a una madre y su hijo, Danny y Baez se debaten entre cumplir con su deber y buscar justicia al descubrir la conexión entre el sospechoso y la víctima.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Apuesta alta
programme.desc: Cuando el hermano de Linda, Jimmy (Kevin Dillon), se mete en problemas con la mafia, le suplica a Danny que lo ayude a mantenerse a salvo hasta que la situación se calme

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas con grandes seguidores en las redes sociales son encontradas muertas en Maryland, la UAC busca un sospechoso asumiendo la personalidad de una leyenda urbana de Internet.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un destacado abogado desaparece en Boston, la UAC descubre secretos en su pasado que podrían señalar las razones de su desaparición.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga crímenes aleatorios en el norte de Virginia y busca a un sospechoso del conflicto, que tiene un deseo incontrolable de matar, él también está lleno de remordimiento.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se llama al UAC a Salt Lake City, Utah, para investigar un triple asesinato, la búsqueda de una conexión entre las víctimas podría llevarlos hasta un fugitivo que podría estar relacionado con el sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga el asesinato de un suboficial principal, creyendo que está relacionado con un traficante de armas internacional.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El secretario de la Marina asigna a Gibbs a trabajar con la Dra. Samantha Ryan después de que información secreta haya sido filtrada desde adentro.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El cuñado del director Vance es el principal sospechoso cuando Gibbs y el equipo de NCIS investigan el asesinato de un marinero.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después del asesinato de un infante de marina, Tony y Ziva buscan a un teniente y capellán desaparecidos en Colombia con un amigo de Ziva. Mientras tanto, Jimmy elige padrino de boda.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Tiffany and Lauren tell Lyle devastating news about his fiancée, Santana. In an attempt to woo a woman into bed, Walt plays some sweet, out-of-tune tunes on his guitar. Daddy brings the wrong girl home from the bar.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Murray wraps up his personal business in Mississippi and returns to the house to learn that the girls are still all up in Lyle and Santana's relationship. Murray convinces Santana to come visit so the couple can talk face to face & figure things out.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The house is divided when a secret comes out about Lyle's fiancé that Tiffany and Lauren have major issues with. Lyle is then forced to make a decision that could change his life forever. Mattie meets a guy who could be the one she's looking for.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: After healthy input from her roommates, Mattie makes a decision regarding her relationship with DJ. Feeling like she's missing out, Hannah invites her boyfriend Cody to the house so she can get some lovin' too.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Lyle gets a shocking text from Santana. The gang goes ghost hunting and may bring home more than they bargained for. Mattie has to choose between her roommates and her family back home.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Wild Lyle returns in full force when the gang decides to take a weekend vacay to a NASCAR race. But after some unexpected news about Santana, Lyle goes off the deep end and lands in an ambulance, rushing to the hospital.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: As Lyle spends time in the hospital, Mattie gives Santana a piece of her mind. Lauren flips her lid and the whole kitchen pays for it. But she's got something extra special in mind for Walt. When Murray's friend comes to visit, things get hog wild.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Lyle Officially breaks it off with Santana over the phone. The crew bets on their Segway race, boys versus girls. The losers must become their opponents' servants for a day. A newly-single Lyle rekindles old desires in Mattie.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Bubba surprises Tiffany with an unexpected visit, but, Tiffany isn't sure how things will go after their recent arguments. After being rejected by numerous men at the bar, Hurricane Martha threatens the shores of Savannah.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The cast says goodbye to Savannah and to each other for the last time. Old wounds open up between Tiffany and Bubba. Santana attempts to win back Lyle. The crew buries a time capsule in the backyard.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Nothing is off-limits as the Party Down South Crew gets together one last time to share their favorite memories and relive their wildest moments from all five vacations together.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin kicks off season three with eight badasses who will go head to head in three bust ass challenges. The last man standing will earn the right to take on the Skullbuster for a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin invites eight hardcore female athletes to visit the ranch to battle through Snatch, Water Logged and The Crate before one competitor gets her shot at the Skullbuster and $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight tough-as-nails athletes are ready to throw down. But will they have what it takes to get through Trench Warfare, Pole Dancer and Chain Gang?

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight rough and tough female athletes must face off in Trench Warfare, Pole Dancer and Chain Gang before they get a chance at the Skullbuster and a shot at $10,000 if they can beat the current benchmark time.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/21/15. Anthony Bourdain travels to Beirut, where he discovers a beautiful country known for its vibrant nightlife and legendary cuisine.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 9/27/2015. Bourdain explores Cuba from its bustling capital city Havana, to the slower paced, music mecca Santiago.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/04/2015. Bourdain and travel companion chef Eric Ripert visit France’s oldest city to experience its stew of cultures and cuisines.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/11/2015. The alluring island of Okinawa is explored by Bourdain from historical, political, cultural and culinary perspectives.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/18/2015. Anthony Bourdain ventures to the Bay Area, where he tries Brazilian Jiu Jitsu, discovers healing through nourishment and enjoys soul food at Real Miss Ollie’s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/25/2015. Anthony Bourdain visits Addis Ababa, to sample dishes like injera bread and soak up Ethiopian melodies with chef Marcus Samuelsson.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 11/01/2015. Anthony Bourdain returns to Borneo after 10 years to enjoy chicken rendang and pork noodles in the street food paradise of Kuala Lumpur.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 11/08/2015. Anthony Bourdain explores the mixing of food, culture and politics in Istanbul, as he enjoys an authentic Turkish breakfast and watches an oil wrestling match.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 11/15/2015. Anthony Bourdain and Charleston resident Bill Murray dine on traditional Gullah cuisine, oyster pie, shrimp and grits.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/17/15. Anthony Bourdain explores the island nation of Madagascar, where he visits the capital city of Tana and samples Malagasy cuisine.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/31/15. Anthony Bourdain travels to his childhood home state with his brother Chris, where they rekindle memories at the classic roadside joint, Hiram’s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/07/15. Bourdain explores the beauty, culture, and food of Budapest, where he samples goulash, fisherman's soup, blood sausage, and chicken liver.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/14/15. There’s another side to Hawaii that many tourists don’t know about. Go with Anthony Bourdain as he explores the unknown area.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 04/29/2018. Head to the US-Mexico border to discover what life is like for the people who live there.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 05/06/2018. Unraveling the stereotypes about Sikhism, one of the most understood religions in the US.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 05/13/2018. Exploring the rich history and traditions of the Gullah Geechee people, who are, in many ways, the seat of African-American culture.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 05/20/2018. People with disabilities share their views on healthcare and how they’re portrayed in media.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A son fights his mom and responding officers, a man tells police the wad of weed in his mouth is not his, and a pack of cigarillos is the root of a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Fort Bend, Texas deputies arrest a man for possession of a crack pipe, and Michigan and Washington police both respond to domestic violence situations.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to put an end to a dangerous stolen vehicle pursuit. An alleged mechanic says he has permission to drive a semi-truck — the owner says otherwise. A couple stops a woman from driving away in their car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect attempts to flee from police, officers find a wanted man trespassing in someone's yard, and officers stop two people suspected of stealing a moped.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a dirt bike tries to elude police while dumping his firearm, and after breaking up a parking lot drug deal, an officer advises a young suspect to make better choices.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sluggish suspect attempts to outrun the police, officers try to piece together a wild fight between neighbors, and a man's plot to extort money from an ex goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist runs a red light then runs from police, deputies arrest an uncooperative domestic violence suspect, and a low-speed chase ends in a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A boyfriend fights a man who’s just groped his girlfriend. Police make several drug related arrests while patrolling the streets of New Orleans on a particularly raucous evening. An adventurous suspect is arrested while scaling down a drainpipe.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate driver attempts to flee on foot. Officers investigate a complaint in front of a local convenience store. Officers coordinate a sting designed to apprehend suspects who patronize prostitutes.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a buy-bust sting operation after a hobbled dealer attempts to flee on foot. An elderly man is questioned after a report that he kicked a juvenile male in the face. A man is shot in the head by his female roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in a stolen vehicle sends officers on a high-speed chase, deputies confront a driver asleep at the wheel, and a trespassing call becomes a neighborhood-wide ordeal.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver takes his unsuspecting passenger on a wild ride as he tries to evade police, a man's date is cut short by a traffic stop, and police are called to evict a roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are involved in a high-speed pursuit of suspected larcenists. Officers order occupants out of a vehicle and immediately give the driver a sobriety test. Officers report to a call of a dispute in a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver tries to escape through an occupied driveway, a man and his dad are found possessing more than just drugs, and five teenagers learn how weed can impact their future.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A recently released convict leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen vehicle, and officers respond to a report of a man pulling a knife on his brother.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a highspeed pursuit of a stolen vehicle. Police contact the Fire Department and alert the guests when they spot a motel fire. Officers pursue a suspect on a stolen motorcycle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit switches gears when the driver flees on foot, an altercation causes tension between neighbors, and a driver is irate when officers search his passenger.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in possession of a stolen car explains his unique nickname to deputies. Police go to the same house twice in under 30 minutes to sort out a messy marital spat. A mom with multiple priors is caught in a bind.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man runs from police over a parole violation. Officers respond when a trouble maker is expelled from a bar for bad behavior. Police pursue a man after he bails from his car during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Prostitute sting operations prove successful for undercover officers in both Wichita, KS and Palm Beach, FL. Officers inform an unsuspecting John that the individual offering up services is likely not who he thinks they are.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Several squad cars join together in pursuit of a pickup truck. Officers conduct a drug raid utilizing percussion grenades. A suspect wanted for numerous robberies flees from police in a sports car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high speed vehicular pursuit results in a foot chase. Officers respond to a domestic call involving the residence's girlfriend and her children who destroyed the man's house. Police respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pursues suspects for reckless driving, police respond to the armed robbery of a pizza delivery driver, and a deputy detects a unique scent during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A foot pursuit ends in arrest after a suspected drug dealer attempts to discard his goods. Police are called to a warehouse after the security guard is held at gunpoint. Police assist a young girl after being struck by a car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers intervene when a dispute between neighbors gets heated, suspects of a shooting lead police on a high-speed pursuit, and a domestic argument gets out of hand.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man can’t handle that his van is getting repossessed. An Uncle finds his nephew has been hiding all kinds of secrets. Past lovers find their old wounds have yet to heal.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies race against time to save a young boy who is trapped inside a house fire. An intoxicated patron demands a beer on credit and argues with a store clerk. An older woman struggles with heroin.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: In Part One of a Two-Part crossover episode to conclude on Without A Trace, a kidnap victim from New York who went missing six years ago may be the same boy whose death Grissom and the CSI team are investigating in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A suspect from Sara's past returns, causing her to question her future as a CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick's addiction to pills begins to impact his job when his investigation into the underground mob in Vegas results in him being targeted as the prime suspect in a mob-related murder case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges has ulterior motives when he stages hypothetical murders in the lab to give his colleagues a chance to play CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team delve into the world of illegal dog fighting to find out who is responsible for the death of a wealthy socialite.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate two murders that take place at the annual bull riding rodeo in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team battle the flu when they are called upon by DDA Klein to investigate the deaths of several key witnesses for a grand jury case against a dangerous Las Vegas gang.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The disturbing death of a 3-year-old girl has a great impact on Catherine as she searches for clues to her murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass and Nick get help from an unlikely source, an incarcerated criminal (Method Man), when investigating two murders that take place in the same apartment building.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover several victims who have green blood, leading them to the conclusion that their deaths are somehow connected.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and the CSI team become involved in the world of Hollywood comedy when a diva sitcom star (Sagal) meets an untimely demise while filming her show in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick is accused of murdering a famous Vegas gangster, and even he is uncertain of his guilt or innocence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Gil Grissom is the supervisor of the graveyard shift of Las Vegas' elite crime scene investigators. Holly Gribbs, fresh out of the academy, joins the team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man is killed after winning a fortune and then dumping his girlfriend. So, Grissom, Nick, and newcomer to the CSI team, Sara Sidle, investigate this one.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara y Greg investigan un incendio forestal que mató a un hombre y quemó gravemente a una mujer. Catherine, Nick y Warrick se ocupan del caso de una familia de tres miembros asesinada en su casa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una noche, cuatro casos. Grissom y Brass consiguen un Hummer robado y un puesto de tacos. Warrick atrapa a una chica muerta. Sara y Greg consiguen un culturista muerto. Nick consigue un chico muerto encontrado en un banco.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass viaja a Hollywood, California, para intentar localizar a la amiga de su hija distanciada, mientras intenta reavivar algún tipo de relación con ella.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Sara investigan el asesinato de un paciente de un hospital psiquiátrico y rápidamente reducen los sospechosos a un puñado de otros pacientes y miembros del personal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un hombre (Alan Rosenberg) con el que Catherine flirteó en un bar reaparece en su vida como sospechoso en la investigación del asesinato de una mujer a la que dispararon y mataron.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos amorosos estudiantes de primer año son encontrados muertos en un saco de dormir en un dormitorio, y Sara y Greg se topan con un callejón sin salida tras otro mientras intentan determinar por qué fueron asesinados los estudiantes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Los equipos de CSI se unen para salvar a uno de los suyos cuando se enteran de que un miembro del equipo ha sido secuestrado y enterrado vivo, y ahora deben encontrarlo antes de que se asfixie bajo metro y medio de tierra.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Los equipos de CSI se unen para salvar a uno de los suyos cuando se enteran de que un miembro del equipo ha sido secuestrado y enterrado vivo, y ahora deben encontrarlo antes de que se asfixie bajo metro y medio de tierra.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Nuestro equipo forense vuelve a estar unido, con Grissom y Catherine liderando tres fantásticos misterios forenses.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una estrella de cine es encontrada muerta en su habitación de hotel después de una fiesta, mientras que un taxista muerto lleva al equipo a una serie de muertes que involucran a trabajadores inmigrantes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Nuestro grupo de investigación de crímenes intenta determinar si hubo juego sucio en la caída de un ama de casa por las escaleras.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un robo en medio de la noche, en una casa suburbana al borde del desierto de Las Vegas, revela un vertedero de cadáveres.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una familia de 4, es brutalmente asesinada en su propia casa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: CSI determina que el suicidio de una joven madre fue en realidad un juego sucio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A “Speed Dating” night for Miami singles turns deadly for one South Beach stud who finds himself on the wrong end of a tire iron.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami Beach is evacuated for a tsunami, but the CSI team remains after discovering a bank robbery plot while investigating a seemingly random murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A string of dead bodies, found off the coast of Miami, turns out to be the work of modern-day pirates. Horatio and the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An innocent man is killed when someone falls on him from a balcony. The CSI team is lead into the center of a high-level sex and murder scandal.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A seemingly random carjacking turns out to be anything but when a young woman's gambling addiction becomes more than the family business can support.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A hospital emergency room shootout investigation puts the CSI team in the middle of a murder case involving the leader of a prominent street gang

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop ends in the murder of a patrolman. The CSI team must sort out a young girl's obsessive love affair in order to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A "Friction Party" at a private suite in one of the city's hotels accommodating hundreds of cruise passengers leaves a young woman dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio faces a former nemesis who escaped his grasp once before, a case of stolen identity leads to murder, the question becomes "which one did it?

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Florida's gator and snake-infested Everglades becomes ground zero for a number of unrelated murders just as fires engulf the rare eco-system.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Florida's gator and snake-infested Everglades becomes ground zero for a number of unrelated murders just as fires engulf the rare eco-system.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a small jet crashes into a residential neighborhood, the wreckage reveals a corpse in the cargo hold, along with a half-million dollars in cash.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The world of extreme skateboard videos turns deadly when the competition heats up inside the studio. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Tax season gets off to a bang when two IRS agents turn up dead. Horatio Caine and the CSI Team are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un robo de joyas aparentemente perfecto termina en asesinato y, cuando se roban pruebas del lugar del crimen del laboratorio, Delko regresa para encontrar al culpable.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una madre suburbana, el equipo de CSI descubre el oscuro pasado de su familia, mientras Delko continúa con su misión encubierta.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la exnovia de Horatio Caine muere en una explosión, el equipo busca dentro de su propio departamento para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie se burla del equipo de CSI dejándole pistas crípticas y cuanto más tarden en decodificar estos acertijos, mayor será la cantidad de muertos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI sufre la trágica pérdida de uno de los suyos cuando un genio psicótico se descontrola en la hermosa Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una camarera en un club exclusivo, Horatio debe buscar en la lista de invitados más elitista de Miami para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Secuestran a una niña y el único testigo que tiene el equipo de CSI es un hombre ciego que oyó el secuestro, lo que lleva a Horatio a un viejo archienemigo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el asesino de la esposa de Horatio se fuga de la cárcel y causa disturbios, deben determinar qué es lo que busca y encontrarlo antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una estrella de telerrealidad, el equipo de CSI investiga al elenco, a los admiradores obsesionados y el pasado oculto de las estrellas para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre afirma haber soñado con un asesinato antes de que sucediera, Horatio debe enviar a Natalia de incógnito para que el equipo determine la verdad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando explota una refinería de azúcar, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI hacen un descubrimiento impactante sobre uno de los empleados de la fábrica.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un pescador escapa por poco de la muerte, el equipo de CSI tiene que esquivar las balas para mantenerlo con vida y descubrir quién lo persigue.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer embarazada es agredida, Horatio y el equipo luchan por ella y la vida de su bebé mientras rastrean a su atacante.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la investigación de un millonario muerto lleva al equipo de CSI a un servicio de citas de elite, Ryan se hace pasar por un empresario para exponer las mentiras del casamentero.

programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a professional diver in relation to a rumor of sunken treasure in the New York Harbor.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a murder tied into a string of “spy” robberies targeting the elite while Mac continues to receive mysterious phone calls.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York based team investigates the bizarre murder of a scientist, as well as the unusual death of a college girl.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a string of murders in New York that revolve around an online world, apparently performed by a hit man.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate two eerie murders on Halloween; one, an apparent zombie attack, the other a faked murder/suicide in a house with a spooky past.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team works to solve two seemingly unrelated murders that after investigations are underway turn out to be connected.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates crimes: one involving a model that was killed on a billboard in Times Square, and another centered around a robbery.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of a groom on his wedding day and the appearance of a mysterious box on the hood of Stella’s car.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac travels to Chicago in order to solve the mystery of the 333 caller while the rest of the CSI team works on a murder in a subway car.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a wealthy man in a hip nightclub and the inadvertent shooting of a young boy during a robbery.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of the owner of a posh hotel as well as the death of a teenager that seems to be connected to Peter Pan.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After a young woman and a prominent judge are murdered, the CSI team works to discover the connection between the two crimes.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a street luger and the mysterious drowning of a woman in a self-sanitizing pay bathroom.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a trained female assassin comes to New York City, she really puts the CSI New York team members’ abilities to the test.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Cuando una asesina entrenada llega a la ciudad de Nueva York, realmente pone a prueba las habilidades de los miembros del equipo de CSI de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El secuestro de una niña y el incendio de su edificio de apartamentos deja a Stella, miembro del equipo de CSI de Nueva York, sintiéndose culpable y sin hogar.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Un tiburón llega a la orilla descargando un cadáver y una extraña escena del crimen que deja al equipo de CSI de Nueva York más que desconcertado.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El asesinato del consejero escolar interrumpe un baile de la escuela secundaria. Mientras tanto, el asesino en serie de taxistas sigue suelto.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Un partido de básquetbol profesional termina temprano, después de que eligen a un fan para el tiro de media cancha de un millón de dólares, él acierta y muere de manera inoportuna.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El asesino de taxistas que el equipo de CSI de Nueva York ha estado tratando de atrapar ataca nuevamente, solo que esta vez es a costa de un policía de Nueva Jersey.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Un robo a un banco hace que Mac investigue el crimen desde dentro para ayudar al ladrón a demostrar que no mató a uno de los rehenes.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Veritas (S5 Ep1)
programme.desc: La saga del robo a un banco de la temporada pasada continúa mientras Mac busca venganza después de que Joe casi lo asesina.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Lectura letal (S5 Ep2)
programme.desc: Un concierto callejero gratuito se convierte rápidamente en la escena de un crimen, la víctima, en este caso, ha sido misteriosamente plagada de radiación.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Turbulencia (S5 Ep3)
programme.desc: Mac viaja a Washington para declarar en el tribunal hasta que se da cuenta de que está cerca de un asesinato cuando una azafata encuentra un cadáver.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sexo, mentiras y silicón (S5 Ep4)
programme.desc: Encuentran muerta a una mujer muy poderosa del mundo de la política y eso deja a muchos desesperados esperando que la información que ella tiene no se filtre.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El costo de vivir (S5 Ep5)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de un joven arqueólogo que pudo haber descubierto la respuesta al misterio de uno de los asesinatos más antiguos de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Suficiente (S5 Ep6)
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a tiros a tres acusados en la víspera de su juicio, Mac se ve obligado a cumplir una promesa que le hizo a un testigo reacio.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Muerto por dentro (S5 Ep7)
programme.desc: La investigación de una escena de crimen flotante lleva al equipo al mundo de SecretU, un mundo artístico de verdaderas confesiones.

programme.title: El Sargento Capulina

programme.title: Santo contra Capulina

programme.title: Escuela para solteras
programme.desc: Amador quiere casarse con sus novia. La jefa de la familia le pone una condición: Todas las hermanas mayores que ella tienen que casarse primero y por orden de edades. Siendo su novia la menor, Amador tiene que buscarles marido a todas sus cuñadas.

programme.title: Corona de Lagrimas
programme.desc: Refugio trabaja como contadora para poder mantener a sus tres hijos. Sin embargo, la vida de todos da un giro cuando uno de ellos es llevado a la cárcel y tienen que resolver sus propios problemas.

programme.title: Rosario
programme.desc: Una mujer mata accidentalmente a su marido mientras actuaba en una obra de teatro.

programme.title: Dream lover: el amante ideal
programme.desc: El arquitecto Ray Reardon lleva una vida de ensueño, repleta de lujos y éxitos. Mientras se recupera de su reciente divorcio, Ray conoce a Lena Mathers y se enamora... Pero su sueño se torna en pesadilla cuando Lena le lleva al borde del abismo.

programme.title: East LA Interchange

programme.title: Bandidos
programme.desc: ¡Prepárate para una comedia de acción de lo más divertida con Bruce Willis, Billy Bob Thornton y Cate Blanchett! Joe (Willis) y Terry (Thornton), dos convictos, arman un plan para robar un banco… hasta que se topan con una ama de casa bastante excéntrica.

programme.title: El caso Thomas Crown
programme.desc: Thomas Crown (McQueen), un millonario de Boston, un hombre que se ha hecho a sí mismo, se aburre de la vida que lleva. Para huir de la rutina, prepara un golpe perfecto: robar un banco y marcharse después a Brasil.

programme.title: Desapareció una noche
programme.desc: La desaparición de una niña en un peligroso vecindario de Boston, une a dos detectives privados con la policía en este fascinante misterio.

programme.title: Paranoia
programme.desc: Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf) pasa los días espiando a los vecinos, mientras cumple un arresto domiciliario de tres meses. Todo es juegos y diversión hasta que las cosas dan un horroroso giro hacia lo peor.

programme.title: Bailando con lobos
programme.desc: Enviado para proteger un puesto fronterizo de Estados Unidos, el teniente John Dunbar se hace amigo de aquellos que él pensaba que tenía que temerle, los indios Sioux.

programme.title: Pecado original
programme.desc: Una mujer, junto con su amante, planea engañar a un hombre rico casándose con él, ganándose su confianza y luego huyendo con todo su dinero. Todo sale según lo previsto hasta que ella se enamora de él.

programme.title: La mujer de mi hermano
programme.desc: Zoe e Ignacio llevan 10 años casados y la pasión se ha enfriado. Una Zoe sexualmente frustrada se siente físicamente atraída por su cuñado. Las cosas se complican aún más después de que ella queda embarazada y descubre que su esposo puede ser gay.

programme.title: A Month By The Lake
programme.desc: Una huésped encantadora en el resort cerca del lago Como tiene el ojo puesto en un simpático y adinerado soltero y hace todo los posible por capturar a su hombre adinerado.

programme.title: La Mexicana
programme.desc: Un hombre trata de llevar a través de la frontera una antigua pistola llamada La Mexicana, que se cree que está maldita, mientras su novia lo presiona para que abandone sus costumbres criminales.

programme.title: The Curious Case Of Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: The Englishman Who Went Up A Hill But Came Down A Mountain (LAS)
programme.desc: Hugh Grant protagoniza un joven que ofende a todo un pueblo al decir que su montaña es una colina. Pronto se da cuenta de que los excéntricos lugareños, guiados por un ingenioso posadero (Colm Meaney) no se detendrán ante nada para defender su honor.

programme.title: Bent: Plan de venganza
programme.desc: En este mordaz thriller policíaco, un policía desacreditado que busca al asesino de su compañero descubre accidentalmente una conspiración gubernamental vinculada al asesinato de una mujer con un coche bomba.

programme.title: Respeto (2012)
programme.desc: Lucas comienza un romance con Jasmine sin saber que antes anduvo con Jacob, uno de sus amigos. Tras sentirse traicionado, Jacob delata a Lucas con el hermanastro de Jasmine y solo provoca la ira entre pandillas.

programme.title: Cara o sello
programme.desc: Carlos Mendoza es un policía honesto. Cuando no acepta un soborno y encarcela a los culpables, despierta la ira de un narcotraficante local, que secuestra a su familia y lo hace elegir entre su familia, su carrera y su compañero.

programme.title: El Robo más Grande de la Historia
programme.desc: Basada en una historia real, Dwayne Johnson interpreta a un detective de la policía de Nueva York que intenta resolver el mayor robo de dinero de la historia de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Terminator 2: juicio final
programme.desc: La máquina no humana que domina la élite del futuro devastado por la guerra despacha un cíborg asesino al pasado para matar a un jovencito porque pronto será el líder de la resistencia en contra de la máquina.

programme.title: Ip Man

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: ternacional Donnie Yen repite su papel icónico como el gran maestro de kung fu, Ip Man.

programme.title: El Norte

programme.title: 7 Soles

programme.title: Cantinflas

programme.title: Me late chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que su prometido muere inesperadamente, una mujer decide aceptar la vida y seguir su sueño de trabajar con chocolate.

programme.title: Ya veremos

programme.title: Cásese quien pueda

programme.title: El infierno

programme.title: The Prophecy

programme.title: La profecía 2: soldados de Dios

programme.title: El día de los inocentes
programme.desc: Cuando Muffy St. John invitó a sus amigos de la universidad a la isla privada de sus padres para divertirse, olvidó decirles que podría ser el último viaje de sus vidas.

programme.title: Viernes 13

programme.title: Viernes 13: Parte 2

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte 3
programme.desc: Ignorando el sangriento legado de Camp Crystal Lake, uno por uno son víctimas del maníaco Jason que los acecha a cada paso ...

programme.title: Hansel y Gretel: Cazadores de brujas

programme.desc: El campamento Lago Crystal ha estado cerrado durante más de 20 años debido a varios feroces asesinatos sin resolver.

programme.title: Evolución

programme.title: Tsubasa RESERVoir CHRoNiCLE

programme.title: Tsubasa RESERVoir CHRoNiCLE
programme.desc: The group chases a feather down a freeway, hitching a ride on a bus full of strange characters and friendly faces; as night falls, hell on wheels approaches, and Syaoran's bravery will know no bounds.

programme.title: Tsubasa RESERVoir CHRoNiCLE
programme.desc: The feather still far down the road; Syaoran and Kurogane battle against a biker gang that seeks to raid their stalled bus.

programme.title: Tsubasa RESERVoir CHRoNiCLE

programme.title: Tsubasa RESERVoir CHRoNiCLE

programme.desc: Inari puts the squeeze on Shu after their night of passion; Kuranosuke tries to blackmail his own father over his extramarital activities.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un misterioso accidente informático llevó a una próspera empresa de fabricación al borde del colapso, poniendo en peligro cientos de puestos de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mañana, en una zona desértica en las afueras de Phoenix, un motociclista descubre el cuerpo de una joven mujer. Había sido golpeada, amarrada, estrangulada y posiblemente violada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la búsqueda del asesino de dos adolescentes de Texas, un perfil de conducta llevó a sospechar de Jason Massey. La ciencia demostró que el perfil era correcto y Massey fue ejecutado mediante inyección letal el 3 de Abril del 2001.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1985, Julie Estes fue secuestrada de una tienda de conveniencia en Southside donde trabajaba. Su cuerpo fue encontrado al día siguiente, pero el asesinato quedó sin resolver hasta el 2003.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: No había una razón clara para que un joven y saludable estudiante universitario estuviera muerto. Pero cuando el forense descubrió una pequeña pista durante la autopsia, los investigadores pudieron descubrir un misterio lleno de traición y venganza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima era un hombre que se forjó a sí mismo que nunca medía sus palabras. Quizás fue asesinado por un cliente o empleado descontento. Tal vez las fotos picantes en su caja fuerte tenían la pista para resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan desafortunado puede ser un hombre? Su esposa se quitó la vida y su novia de la universidad se suicidó de la misma manera catorce años antes. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto era solo una extraña coincidencia o dos asesinatos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Muere un atleta de secundaria, luego de que lo atropellaran y se dieran a la fuga. Todos en el pueblo lamentaron su muerte. Encontrar al asesino era muy poco probable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Acechado en la noche
programme.desc: Cuando una víctima es brutalmente asesinada en su propia cama, los investigadores encuentran una huella de zapato en el barro de afuera, evidencia física que esperan que conduzca al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una talentosa presentadora de noticias de televisión fue asesinada a tiros fuera de su casa; parecía ser un crimen pasional, perpetrado por un fanático obsesionado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un pediatra, provocada por la misteriosa muerte de uno de sus pacientes, conduce a un hospital de Texas donde la tasa de mortalidad pediátrica es más alta que en cualquier hospital del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Robert Sims regresa a casa después de trabajar en el turno de noche y encuentra a su esposa inconsciente en el piso de la cocina. Su hijo está profundamente dormido en una habitación de arriba, pero su hija de seis semanas, Heather, no está.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se descubrió un esqueleto humano en las marismas de Carolina del Norte y, cuando los investigadores descubrieron que había estado muerta durante 18 meses, sabían que sería difícil descubrir quién era, y mucho más quién la mató.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, el desarrollador inmobiliario de Colorado, Alan Helmick, fue encontrado muerto a tiros en su casa por su esposa Miriam, quien luego se convirtió en la principal sospechosa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la década de los 90, los medios llamaron a Richard Rogers el "asesino de la última llamada" porque atacaba a hombres en bares gay que obviamente estaban intoxicados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Camino fatal
programme.desc: Un patrullero de carreteras fue enviado a lo que pensó que sería un accidente de tráfico de rutina hasta que miró en el automóvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray fue acusada de la muerte de su esposo. Su hijo estaba tan convencido de su inocencia que se matriculó en la facultad de derecho, estudió todas las pruebas y, finalmente, descubrió la verdad de lo que realmente sucedió entre sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2007, Brian y Beverly Mauck fueron encontrados muertos en su casa en Graham Washington. Usando una huella de la palma de una mano y de un zapato en la escena del crimen, los investigadores enfocan su atención en Daniel Tavares, quien había tatuado la espalda de Brian.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un millonario y su familia fueron ejecutados en su propio hogar. Durante tres años, los crímenes quedaron sin resolverse. Finalmente, una caja de 30 años de municiones y unas fibras fluorescentes revelan la traición final.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pista elemental
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres del mismo pueblo fueron asesinadas de la misma manera, la policía temió que un asesino en serie estuviera suelto.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Noticia de última hora
programme.desc: Una joven productora de noticias de televisión es violada y asesinada en su apartamento. La policía identifica a dos sospechosos, pero ambos son absueltos de cualquier delito.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pedido fatal
programme.desc: Un hombre es encontrado muerto en su casa y su ex esposa tiene una coartada perfecta. Para determinar la hora de la muerte, los investigadores deben saber cuándo comió la víctima por última vez.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una hermosa joven cayó a su muerte desde un acantilado con vistas al océano. Inicialmente, los investigadores pensaron que se trataba de un trágico accidente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un tiroteo desde un vehículo deja un hombre muerto y otro gravemente herido. Las llamadas de teléfonos celulares y los casquillos de bala apuntan a un sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Atormentada por la desaparición de su madre, una joven emprendió su propia investigación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, el pornógrafo de San Francisco Artie Mitchell fue asesinado en su casa. Su hermano y socio comercial, que fue encontrado cerca del lugar con un rifle, luego confiesa haber disparado a Artie, pero la pregunta es si el disparo fue premeditado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven es encontrada muerta en su departamento.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.desc: A look at the new set of challenges the Duttons face in the early 20th century, including the rise of western expansion, Prohibition and the Great Depression.

programme.title: Yellowstone: 1923 - Behind the Story
programme.desc: A look at the new set of challenges the Duttons face in the early 20th century, including the rise of western expansion, Prohibition and the Great Depression.

programme.title: Finding Little Italy
programme.desc: Umbria, the ‘green heart of Italy’, the ‘wilder Tuscany’, is an area not hindered by grand centres of tourism. This is little Italy in its purest form. An attractive region of hills and mountains stuffed to bursting with hidden treasures.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Argentina
programme.desc: Mountains of Extreme

programme.title: Saving Rhino Phila
programme.desc: From deep within a conflict emerges a powerful emotional story of survival. A new breed of poachers has recently gone to war on South Africa's rhino population and against all odds; one rhino has survived their bullets. Her name is Phila.

programme.title: Life In The World's Largest Crater
programme.desc: Just over two billion years ago, a meteorite the size of Table Mountain slammed into Earth just outside the present day town of Vredefort. It created a scar that is today recognised as the oldest and largest meteorite impact site in the world.

programme.title: Across The World With Te Radar
programme.desc: Te Radar goes global on an expedition of discovery to find innovative ways people are helping the environment. Looking at the future of cars sees Te Radar delivering wing mirrors made of potato starch to a Formula Three team in Britain

programme.title: Disruptive Nature
programme.desc: 2014 Oso Mudslide Washington. In Oso Washington USA, A portion of an unstable hill collapsed, engulfing a rural neighbourhood and drowning a 1 square mile area.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: Episode 4

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: Vancouver Island's glaciers fuel the flow of some of Canada's tallest waterfalls, and an endless network of rivers and creeks provides the ideal habitat for one of the world's most important fish – the pacific salmon.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: Kristina is back with Sean and hosted at the Hide Safari Camp in Hwange National Park at their driest period. A night drive leads them to a unique finding.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: The Florida Peninsula is dominated by an immense wealth of woodland, specifically wetlands and swamps.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time on the Cheetah Diaries, we catch up with cub Coll after he was rushed to the vet last week. Whenever cheetah outreach is asked for a public appearance, Joe is the natural choice, but even super stars have off days.

programme.title: Hurricane: The Anatomy
programme.desc: Episode one seeks the \\"Holy Grail\\" of hurricane research: the reason for the sudden deadly leaps in storm power, known as Rapid Intensification.

programme.title: Peace Parks
programme.desc: In this series we follow the trail of the Transfrontier Parks bordering on South Africa and extending into neighbouring countries. We explore why these conservation areas are important and what they protect.

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Croatia - Kvarner
programme.desc: Overcoming a turbulent past, this is where tourism and the Croatian language were written. Full of islands, coastal areas, and mountaintops, this rich landscape was settled by the wealthy.

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Switzerland - Secrets of Switzerland
programme.desc: Explore the secret towns of Switzerland deep within the Alps by bus, train, railway, and cogwheel.

programme.title: Coral Reef Adventure
programme.desc: Coral Reef Adventure follows the real-life expedition of ocean explorers and underwater filmmakers Howard and Michele Hall. The Halls guide us to the islands and sun-drenched waters of the South Pacific to document the health and beauty of coral reefs.

programme.desc: A cargo net is draped off the back of a stage coach. Contestants take turns playing street hockey goalie as a hockey puck machine shoots pucks at them. Three wet pipes are suspended by cranes 90 feet up in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant must exit from a speed boat by grabbing onto ladder that is hanging out of a helicopter. The contestant has to transfer mealworms from a Plexiglas container to a scale. Contestants will launch themselves in a car off a 3 foot high ramp.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will climb up 4 stories on a hook and ladder with 70 pounds of gear. Contestant must lay in a pit for 2 minutes while scorpions are dropped on them. Contestants will be put on a platform suspended from a crane 100 feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants fall out of a speeding helicopter. Contestant must consume 10 live slugs and a shot of cow bile. Each contestant must cross between two buildings by placing three planks in front of them on top of two tight ropes as they walk.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be placed on a 20 foot rope ladder. Contestants play a game to determine quantity of food they will have to eat. Contestant must walk across a 12 inch wide and 60 foot long beam suspended 100 feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this stunt, the contestant will be placed on a 30 foot truss structure. Contestant moves electric eels from one side of tank to the other. In this stunt, the contestant will be seated on a barrel hung by 20 foot long cables underneath a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be placed in a plexiglass cabinet. One person retrieves roaches using only their mouth and transfers it to their partner's mouth, who in turn drops it into another bin. In this stunt, it will be a husband and wife team.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants stand in front of a long table with 13 holes. Contestant enters a cylindrical glass tank filled with water and then dead frozen mice are dumped in. The contestant will be standing on a large plexiglass platform in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will start on the roof of The Mandalay Bay. A tank is filled with Piranha and pig kidneys, which will need to be picked up off using their mouth. The contestants are allowed to eat up to six cave spiders.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Taxi cabs will each be suspended from their own crane. Player is placed inside a sealed Plexiglas coffin with thousands of roaches. The contestants will be hung by their ankles from a crane and suspended over a swimming pool.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young girl was discovered on isolated farmland near Delano, California. She had no ID, but police found mailbox keys in the pocket of her jeans. With no other clues, they checked the mailboxes of every apartment building in Delano.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The driver said he couldn't have hit and killed a pedestrian on a Harrisburg street. The Jeep Grand Cherokee he was leasing around that time had been sold months ago to a buyer in another state.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a popular young man, investigators faced the daunting task of searching for one boat among 1200 others.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young man was killed in a mysterious car crash, but the evidence at the scene led investigators to believe it was not an accident. Forensic science revealed what really happened and the truth devastated three families.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman went missing, friends and family were determined to find her. Their worst fears were confirmed weeks later when her body was discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, 82-year-old Kathryn Bishop was found dead in her Pennsylvania home. Tiny clues on the victim's body would tell police what happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A bomb, constructed to cause as much damage as possible, kills a victim with deadly force and flame. When a painstaking search yields some tiny clues, police are able to identify the killer as surely as if he'd signed them.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her. Fibers on her clothing would prove she was telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the number and volume of bloodstains at the scene was greater than usual, it was up to forensic scientists to find out why.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The wife of a respected police officer was murdered in her own home. The crime went unsolved for more than a decade, until a newly formed cold case unit took a fresh look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue — a flaw on a mailing envelope — exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: They thought the fire would cover their crime. But one tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, remained. It held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, 19-year-old Shannon Melendi disappeared while at Emory University. Her disappearance remained a mystery for ten years, until new scientific testing cast a different light on Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, the death of Crystal Purcell was considered an accident. Then in 2001, Barbara Purcell called police to suggest that her estranged husband had killed Crystal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Paul Gruber's daughter suspected something was wrong when she received birthday cards addressed from her father, but written in a stranger's handwriting.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The woman was dead. The man had been shot four times and survived. When the man's version of events contradicted physical evidence, investigators turned to forensic science to paint a clearer picture of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: How did the stalker obtain the security system code for his victim's home? How did he steal her personal photographs? Police needed answers and they found them in the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run accident claimed the life of a high school athlete, everyone in town mourned his passing. Finding the killer was a long shot at best.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder trail turned cold, until police got a call from a woman whose husband, Gerald Powers, had a criminal past and a fondness for Chevy Berettas.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
