programme.desc: Lucy has misplaced her and Ethel's train tickets to Florida and they must share a ride with strange Mrs. Grundy. Mrs Grundy's odd behavior becomes more troubling to Lucy and Ethel when they learn that an escaped hatchet murderess matches her description.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: While on vacation in Florida, Lucy and Ethel go on a shopping spree and spend a whopping $140! To make sure that their wives don't repeat their spree Ricky and Fred take the ladies on their next fishing trip.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky and Fred are scheduled to judge a beauty contest but Lucy and Ethel plan for them to miss it. The four go out on a little cruise before the contest and Lucy has arranged for the boat's gas tank to be only half-filled.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky and Fred are scheduled to judge a beauty contest but Lucy and Ethel plan for them to miss it. The four go out on a little cruise before the contest and Lucy has arranged for the boat's gas tank to be only half-filled.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes are cast in Little Ricky's school play when it runs short of cast members. Ricky plays a hollow tree, Lucy is the wicked witch, Fred plays the friendly frog, and Ethel is transformed in to the fairy princess.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky insults Lucy's taste in hats so, as a joke, Lucy puts a loving cap trophy on her head that Ricky plans to present to champion jockey Johnny Longden at a National Turf Association dinner later that night. The trophy gets stuck on Lucy's head.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Little Ricky is turning 5 years old and Lucy had a party planned for Saturday, but Caroline Appleby is throwing a birthday party for her son Stevie on the same day. Neither mother is willing to change the date of their party.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky are determined to get rid of the puppy their son has brought home. They have a hard time overcoming Little Ricky’s arguments that it’s a welcome addition to a home that already boasts a parakeet, a frog, a lizard, a turtle and a goldfish.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy has become tired of living in the city and drops some none-too-subtle hints to Ricky that it would be nice to move to the country. Unbeknownst to her Ricky has already placed a comfortable deposit on a house in Westport, Connecticutt.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos are anxious about their move to the country. Reality really sets in when Fred shows their apartment to a young couple. The Taylors will take the apartment but need to move in immediately.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos get settled in their country home after all those years in a New York apartment and immediately begin to miss their old friends, Fred and Ethel. Lucy and Ricky decide to surprise the Mertzes with a visit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Wanting to replace their old furniture, Lucy gets an allowance of $500 from Ricky. Lucy goes overboard when she shops with their new neighbor Betty Ramsey, spending over three thousand dollars!

programme.title: Sue Thomas F.B.Eye
programme.desc: Sue and her unit are assigned to protect a visiting dignitary targeted for assassination by terrorists.

programme.title: Sue Thomas F.B.Eye
programme.desc: Sue cultivates her first FBI informant after Jack and Bobby bust a guy for selling steroids; an office manager is determined to make Myles' life miserable.

programme.title: Sue Thomas F.B.Eye
programme.desc: Sue gets called in after a car theft suspect turns out to be deaf and communicates solely through sign language.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: When a cabin in the woods burns down, the bodies of two witches are revealed; Angela and Hodgins are arrested.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Everyone at the Jeffersonian tries to uncover forensic evidence to help elicit a conviction in the trial of the Gravedigger.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: The remains of a hoarder are discovered; Angela's father (Billy Gibbons) visits; Booth and Brennan are each confronted with unique opportunities.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: The team helps Cam solve the case of an unidentified boy; after making personal discoveries, the members of the team realize they belong in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy reservist's body is found in a beat-up car at the end of a gun range; Kasie weighs the pros and cons of buying a gun.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a hotshot financial adviser is found shot at a naval station, NCIS investigates the case by interviewing the victim's 3D hologram of herself, which she created before her death.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: NCIS is called in when Navy Chief Warrant Officer Rafi Nazar is suspected of trying to sell stolen classified Navy software used to pilot combat drones.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After a civilian research vessel in the North Atlantic picks up a small boat of wounded Navy officers, NCIS arrives on the ship and is forced to hide after discovering terrorists are onboard.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When the body of a Navy lieutenant is discovered missing an eye, the NCIS investigation leads to the world of cage fighting.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: While investigating the death of an intruder at Quantico, Jimmy and Kasie are exposed to a deadly biotoxin; the NCIS team calls on Dr. Carol Wilson for help as they race to find the antidote; Torres tries to distract Jimmy's daughter.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: As NCIS investigates the cause of death of a reservist Navy SEAL surgeon, they're forced to bring Vance's daughter to help with a highly dangerous mission.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Two-time veterans Bubba Irwin and Sarah Miller return to coach the men's and women's teams, and the artists showcase their knack for legibility by inking surrealistic tattoos.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Cam's arrogant behavior continues to irritate his team members during a color contrast challenge, and the gang bands together to sabotage Cam's standing in the competition.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: It's every man and woman for themselves when the artists tattoo any design in any style before a blind critique from the judges.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: In a test of consistency, the teams must engrave full suits of armor, then a cross-stitch style elimination tattoo throws all the artists for a loop.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The artists go head-to-head in a test of technical application, and the losers fight for their survival in an elimination tattoo challenge dictated by the victors.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The artists think outside the box as they show their understanding of color theory, then get a crash course in new school style from their coaches Jime Litwalk and Kelly Doty.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Composition must be perfect as the remaining competitors draw freehand tattoos on their canvases, and coaches James Vaughn and Megan Jean Morris offer the artists advice.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Every decision counts as the artists choose someone else's tattoo design and make it their own in a true test of adaptability.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: As the women's team plots to dismantle the men's team, the judges unveil a combination of detail design and cover-up challenges that are helmed by two domineering coaches.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: With only seven competitors remaining, the canvases hold all the power as the artists are challenged to out-market their rivals and work outside their creative comfort zones.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The artists paint custom wheelchair spoke guards in the flash challenge and show finesse as they take on difficult back-of-the-neck tattoos in the elimination tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The final five artists are tasked with creating murals using paintball guns, then must work across disciplines in a traditional illustrative portrait elimination challenge.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: To earn a spot in the finale, the final four artists endure a grueling, blind-judged tattoo marathon and then endeavor to reinterpret a rival's best work.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Seven coaches compete in the Clash of the Coaches Face-Off, the final three artists unveil their 35-hour back pieces, and one artist wins $100,000 and the Ink Master title.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En la costa del golfo de Misisipi, un juez y su esposa política fueron asesinados de manera salvaje dentro de su casa.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: La corrupción en el Departamento de Policía de Nueva Orleans se expandió como un cáncer a principios de 1990.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Los residentes de la pequeña ciudad de Noel, Misuri, quedaron sorprendidos cuando uno de sus bancos fue robado.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Desde mayo hasta julio de 1984, Alton Coleman y su pareja de hecho, Denis Brown, se involucraron en una ola de asesinatos que atravesó seis estados y que dejó ocho personas muertas, entre ellos, niños.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Una joven madre y su hijo desaparecieron misteriosamente de su casa. El esposo de la mujer era el único sospechoso, pero luego quedó descartado.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1980, el FBI comenzó una extensa búsqueda de operación encubierta, de nombre en código "Safebet", que fue diseñada para exponer la infiltración de la mafia de Chicago en los alrededores de los suburbios de la ciudad.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Después de una serie de robos violentos a bancos y asesinatos en el sur de Miami a mediados de los 80, el FBI se embarcó en una investigación exhaustiva de ocho meses.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A inicios del verano de 1990, empezaron a aparecer cuerpos de varias mujeres dentro y en los alrededores de la ciudad de Viena, Austria.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El 20 de agosto de 1980, un francotirador invisible asesinó a dos hombres negros jóvenes mientras trotaban con dos mujeres blancas en Salt Lake City, Utah.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Chevie y Cheyne Kejoe ganaron la atención nacional después de la grabación de un tiroteo en una cinta con oficiales estatales y locales en Wilmington, Ohio, el 15 de febrero de 1997.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En abril de 1995, en Washington D. C., dos oficiales recibieron disparos y uno de ellos fue asesinado. Cada uno había estado sentado en sus patrullas cuando un hombre se acercó sigilosamente y abrió fuego.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Las tensiones raciales en Búfalo durante 1980 estaban en su punto máximo todo el tiempo. Seis hombres negros habían sido asesinados de manera violenta: a dos de ellos les habían arrancado el corazón.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El 3 de febrero de 1990, una niña huyó de la casa de su madre y desapareció sin dejar rastro. Su madre esperaba que la policía de Pasadena, en Texas, pudiera encontrarla antes de que fuera muy tarde.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer en Delaware desapareció en 1996, sus amigos y su familia descubrieron su vida secreta. La secretaria del gobernador había tenido un amorío ilícito con un hombre casado y acaudalado.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Easter Sunday: Jersey Shore style. Lola the Bunny returns, Angelina and Snooki wreak havoc at a winery, and the roommates enjoy an old-fashioned night out on the boardwalk.The only thing standing in the way of a good time is the beef between Mike & Deena.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Dren (n): Snooki's alter ego. Pauly and Nikki arrive, and the roommates meet the local wildlife. But the lions and tigers and bears got nothing on Snooki when Dren takes over on Nikki's birthday.

programme.desc: Dren continues her attack on San Diego. Something is going on between Angelina and Vinny. And, when the roommates take a trip to San Diego's Little Italy, they're surprised to find the ultimate Guido waiting for them - Uncle Nino.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Deena's "Family Fun Day" has Angelina struggling in the wake of her failed marriage. Jenni lands in the emergency room. And Nick Cannon and Justina Valentine lead the squad in an impromptu game of "Wild 'N Out." May the funniest guido win!

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Water turns into wine and in the blink of an eye, it's pure chaos between Pauly, Nikki, and Angelina.

programme.desc: Your favorite roommates aren't done yet! Vinny and Angelina get spicy, the Meatballs embrace their wild side, and tensions get so hot one roommate leaves to cool off. The party continues tonight with Part 2 of the Jersey Shore reunion!

programme.desc: The roommates rally around Mike as he says goodbye to his beloved dog, Mosey. Deena's on edge because Angelina's been hanging out with her brother-in-law. And the fam gets a big surprise when they hit the Shore for DJ Pauly D's gig at Headliners.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Snooki turns Deena, Angelina and JWoww into a cheer squad. Mike channels Rocky as he trains for the Super Hole 3 Corn Hole Championships, but Angelina inadvertently jeopardizes his chance for the win. And the fam heads south for the big event.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Just an ordinary day at the lake, filled with boating, drinking, fighting, lap dancing...and a revelation that leaves the roomies speechless.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: What's next for Angelina after revealing her true feelings for Vinny? And, in the words of Pauly D, a game of truth or dare gets "Awkward." Plus, the cornhole finals are here and The Situation is ready for Jay Cutler.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When a secret military satellite is forced out of orbit by Cobra, the Joe team races to its location before Cobra can get their hands on it. But both the Joes and Cobra find that a third party has entered the battle for the device.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: In a diabolical plan to control the world's fuel supplies, Cobra begins detonating oil tankers and pipelines by remote. But when sparks uncovers the frequency Cobra is using to destroy the tankers, the Joe team may be able to turn the tables on them!

programme.title: Chop Chop Ninja
programme.desc: Iro embarks in a desperate yet fruitless quest to find his ninja name. Only when forced to halt his search to thwart the General's latest attack, does his ninja name become self-evident and “Iro the Daring” is born.

programme.title: Chop Chop Ninja
programme.desc: Iro thinks the secret to being a great Chop Chop ninja lies within a fancy ancient book he found. To prove him wrong, Master Enoki sends him, and his friends, on a simple mission: deliver a letter!

programme.title: Chop Chop Ninja
programme.desc: The annual Pig Fair is on! Kami tries to punish Tetsuo for being a big bully, but his plan backfires when he summons an even bigger bully, the Big Ash Ogre! Kami and the Chop Chops are forced to work together to save the day!

programme.title: Chop Chop Ninja
programme.desc: Master Enoki warns the Chop Chops to stay away from Magic Master but Iro can't refuse a challenge and is lured into a trap. The others embark on a rescue mission and all will discover the secret of the Chop Chop medallion.

programme.title: Chop Chop Ninja
programme.desc: When one of the General's clones ends up at the Academy, kindhearted Tetsuo takes him in with open arms. Iro, however, does not trust this newcomer and will stop at nothing to prove that he's an evil spy sent by the General!

programme.title: Chop Chop Ninja
programme.desc: The ninjas are ready for the General's annual attack, but it never comes. While getting lunch, Iro gets hit by the General's underground attack! The sworn enemies are captured by an evil mole and must work together to escape!

programme.title: Chop Chop Ninja
programme.desc: With Enoki on a mission, Miss Sharp steps in as a substitute teacher. The ninjas can't believe how easy she is to fool… until she sends them on a dangerous mission in the middle of the night!

programme.title: Chop Chop Ninja
programme.desc: Determined to win a TV show's “Prank of the Year” award, Neeko teams up with Fishman and the General to unleash a mega prank on the whole city. Neeko discovers too late that the General isn't the prankster he thought he was.

programme.title: Chop Chop Ninja
programme.desc: The Chop Chops head off for a camping adventure organized by Tetsuo when his medallion quadrant awakes. The ninjas must find Tetsuo's quadrant while escaping the notoriously dangerous Stone Munch.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra attempts to create amphibious soldiers capable of breathing on land and sea. But when the experiment fails and the beautiful test subject Mara can only survive underwater, Cobra hunts her down to determine what went wrong.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. When Dusty needs money to care for his ailing mother, he unknowingly accepts help from Cobra agents. Finding that sensitive information has been leaked to the enemy, the Joe team begins to suspect the young recruit of betrayal.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. A member of the G.I. Joe team has defected to Cobra, and the stakes are high. Sensitive information is now in Cobra hands, with Dusty among their ranks. The Joes have to battle Cobra - and their former friend - in a full on assault!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: The Joe team is placed under the command of Watchdog, the ultimate military computer purchased by the Pentagon to wipe out the forces of terrorism and Cobra. The only problem, thanks to the enemy programming, is that it may be a double agent.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When Cobra hijacks a network of communication satellites, the Joes must launch their first space mission. Members undergo an arduous training program to select potential astronauts, resulting in a fierce competition to become the first Joe in space.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When a suspected invasion from outer space threatens the planet, the Joes are forced to team up with their Russian counterparts, the Oktober Guard. But as the two teams struggle to contain the threat, they discover more than they bargained for.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: A nearly-bankrupt Cobra makes a desperate attempt to stay afloat, disguising Zartan and the Dreadnoks as a new heavy metal band called Cold Slither. Unfortunately, their subliminal mind-control music is a big hit!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When a surprise attack by Cobra reveals that the Joes have gotten sloppy, General Hawk enlists Sergeant Slaughter to whip the team back into shape. Meanwhile, Dr. Mindbender plots to build a new Cobra leader from the DNA of famous historic conquerors.

programme.title: Adventures Of Super Mario Bros. 3
programme.desc: King Koopa plans to kidnap Prince Hugo, so he can turn him into a poodle and turns Cheatsy, Bully, Big Mouth and Kooky into Sneaky Lying Cheating Giant Ninja Koopa which Mario and friends would have to save the prince.

programme.title: Adventures Of Super Mario Bros. 3
programme.desc: Princess Toadstool and Toad go to Hawaii for a vacation, while leaving the Mario Bros. in charge of the Mushroom Kingdom. / King Koopa and Kooky plan to go to the place where the Mario Bros. have gone into the Mushroom Kingdom by using time travel.

programme.title: Adventures Of Super Mario Bros. 3
programme.desc: Hip and Hop Koopa steal Prince Mushroomkamen's case, which the Queen got angry and is looking for her son.

programme.title: Adventures Of Super Mario Bros. 3
programme.desc: When Mario and Luigi get fed up with each other, Luigi soon finds himself having to save his brother from Koopa and Kooky. / Koopa brings TV hero Mighty Plumber to life and tricks him into robbing the Pipe Land Treasury.

programme.title: Adventures Of Super Mario Bros. 3
programme.desc: When Princess Toadstool challenges Koopa to an election over leadership of the Mushroom Kingdom, Kooky uses a nice guy potion on Koopa to make all the voters like him.

programme.title: Adventures Of Super Mario Bros. 3
programme.desc: Fed up with Koopa's ways, Kootie Pie and Big Mouth bring a Hollywood movie monster to life and convince him he's their real dad.

programme.title: Adventures Of Super Mario Bros. 3

programme.title: Adventures Of Super Mario Bros. 3
programme.desc: King Koopa busts out a top criminal, so he can teach the Koopalings to steal and to stop the Mario Brothers. / Hip and Hop Koopa turn Luigi and King Whim-bag, of the ice world, into dogs with the king's wand.

programme.title: Lyft Comics

programme.title: Lyft Comics

programme.title: Lyft Comics

programme.title: Real Husbands Of Hollywood

programme.title: Real Husbands Of Hollywood

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.desc: Inspector Ganimard III is the grandson of Lupin I's archnemesis. He has come to Japan as the head of security for the 1972 France Fair but also intends to restore his family's honor by arresting Lupin III.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Someone is committing thefts under Lupin's name. Lupin follows the imposters back to their island hideout. He has apparently stumbled into a whole island of thieves.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Rie is being held captive though she does not realize it. She believes the man holding her is a friend of her father, Ken Makita. Lupin shows up to rescue her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Gordon, an FBI computer specialist, is in Japan to operate a computer capable of predicting crimes and determining how to stop them. The Metropolitan Police Department hopes that this will finally help them capture Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: A disputed horde of recently discovered ancient gold coins draws the attention of Lupin and company. As the ownership of the coins is disputed, Lupin decides to settle the matter on his own by stealing them from the Dai Nippon Bank.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Bye Bye, Lady Liberty
programme.desc: Foiled repeatedly by the predictions of Interpol's supercomputer, professional looter Lupin III has settled down. A sinister secret organization and a young computer genius are thrown into the mix. And whose side is the buxom Fujiko on this time?

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/25/2003: Josh Beckett tags Jorge Posada for the final out in his nine-strikeout, complete game shutout vs. the Yankees in Game 6 of the 2003 World Series, giving the Marlins their second championship.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 7/20/04: On July 20, 2004 Albert Pujols goes 5-for-5 at the plate against Cubs pitchers and smashes three home runs in the Cardinals' incredible 11-8 comeback win.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Randy Johnson was one of baseball's most accomplished pitchers, but the perfect game was one feat that had eluded him throughout his career. That changed on May 18, 2004 vs. the Braves when the 40-year old became the oldest pitcher to toss a perfect game.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Ken Griffey Jr. gifted his father Ken Griffey Sr. with an incredible moment on Father's Day 2004. Junior came to the plate in the 6th inning and crushed the 500th home run of his career. After rounding the bases, father and son shared a hug to celebrate.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/11/2004 - Carlos Beltran continued his historic run in the 2004 postseason with a two-homer game against the Braves in Game 5 of the NLDS, helping to send the Astros to the NLCS.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The wife of a deceased scientist, Kurt Zubrovnik, is being pressured by Eastern forces to work for them.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Josef Varsh plans to put an American on trial on false charges, discredit the West, and gain power.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Enemy agent Janos Passik is preparing to train 200 foreign agents to infiltrate the U.S. and engage in some form of bacteriological warfare.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Gangster Jack Wellman is moving syndicated crime into politics, killing off certain politicians and replacing them with men more sympathetic to the Syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: An imprisoned member of the Nazi party, Herbert Raynor, is released from prison and is being flown to Puerto Huberra in South America, along with other Nazis.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The team must break a Communist assassin who killed a U.S. Senator.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Brandon Margulies explains how to play a video game. Keith David shows how the machine works. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, everyone is getting ready for the Olympic games. Lady Elaine has decided to make it snow.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Diana: 7 días que conmocionaron al mundo

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja ordena unas armas falsas; Calamardo finge ser un fantasma.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja lleva a la hija de Don Cangrejo al baile escolar. Bob Esponja y Calamardo compiten por ser el empleado del mes.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: En `SB-129', Calamardo accidentalmente se encuentra a sí mismo en el futuro, y para su sorpresa extraña a Bob Esponja, luego en `Karate Choppers', Bob Esponja y Sandy descubren el karate.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: En `Sleepy Time' Bob Esponja visita los sueños de sus amigos y vecinos. Mientras que en `Suds', Bob Esponja llega con una enfermedad que lo transforma en fabricante de burbujas.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo convence a Bob Esponja y Patricio de unirse a él en una búsqueda del tesoro. Bob Esponja se sube al autobús equivocado.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja deja a todo el mundo enojado con sus bromas del Día de los Inocentes; Bob Esponja tiene el reto de cocinar para el Rey Neptuno y decide participar en un concurso entre cocineros.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo advierte a SpongeBob que se mantenga alejado de los anzuelos; Bob Esponja convoca a su héroes favoritos para las emergencias.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Patricio y Bob Esponja aprenden a atar sus zapatos; Calamardo está a cargo del Crustáceo Cascarudo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Todo Fondo de Bikini huye de Bob Esponja y Patricio le dice que es por ser feo, pero en realidad tiene mal aliento; Perlita obtiene un trabajo en el Crustaceo Cascarudo, se encarga de ponerlo a la moda.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Patricio está encantado cuando recibe un premio, pero por desgracia, era para Bob Esponja; luego, Bob Esponja hace un nuevo amigo, una burbuja que le hace compañía, lo que hace que la gente piense que está loco.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja tiene que lidiar con unas peligrosas bombas-tartas piratas; luego, Plankton construye un falso Don Cangrejo para obtener la receta de Krabby Patty.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja inventa hamburguesas con colores; Sandy pone a Bob Esponja y a Patricio a cuidar de su oruga.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se pregunta si se puede ser grande y todavía besar a su abuela; Calamardo se muda de Fondo de Bikini.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se esconde de Sandy; Bob Esponja y Patricio piden prestado un globo de una tienda y accidentalmente lo revientan.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio se cuelan en Treedome; Gary sigue a Patricio por los alrededores y Bob Esponja se pone celoso.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: La Sra. Puff hará cualquier cosa para asegurarse que Bob Esponja pase su examen de manejo y Bob Esponja descubre que su héroe no es tan importante.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: SpongeBob cuenta chistes maliciosos; SpongeBob falla su examen de conducir; SpongeBob cuida el hogar de Mermaid Man y Barnacle Boy.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Mientras trabaja en el turno de la noche, Calamardo le cuenta a Bob Esponja una historia de miedo acerca de un asesino.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja intenta escribir un ensayo de 800 palabras antes del amanecer; Patrick trata de impresionar a sus padres en el día de las estrellas de mar.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja lee una palabra soez y no sabe lo que significa, pero la repite. Bob Esponja se inscribe en una clase de arte que imparte Calamardo, pero él es un profesor arrogante y quiere seguir las explicaciones del libro al pie de la letra.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Pat consigue un trabajo en el Chum Bucket y compite con Bob Esponja en los juegos Fry Cook; Bob Esponja lleva una manada de medusas al Sr. Cangrejo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Como Don Cangrejo es injusto con sus empleados, Bob Esponja y Calamardo deciden hacer una huelga. Una lombriz aterroriza Fondo de Bikini.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se ofrece como salvavidas. Además, Plankton inventa una máquina que le permite cambiar de vida con don Cangrejo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo no está permitido en la casa del árbol de Bob Esponja y Patricio; luego, Bob Esponja adopta un caballito de mar, y se lo lleva por todas partes.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja descubre que Calamardo nunca ha probado una Krabby Patty; y luego, Bob Esponja es preocupado por un nuevo alumno en la escuela de canotaje.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo y Bob Esponja ocultan el cuerpo de un inspector de sanidad; Bob Esponja y Patricio tiran su nueva TV y conservan la caja.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio le muestran a Calamardo una ó dos cosas acerca de la nieve en `The Snowball Effect', y en `One Krab's Trash', el Sr Krabs accidentalmente vende un sombrero valioso a Bob Esponja.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: El estrellato se sube a la cabeza de Bob Esponja después de que él aparece en el comercial de bajo presupuesto del Crustáceo Cascarudo; Calamardo se empobrece.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se entrevista para un trabajo como cocinero en Krusty Krab; jardín de Calamardo; Bob Esponja conoce a Sandy Cheeks.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja tiene pesadillas tras haber visto una película de terror: cree que los robots han tomado el control del mundo. Bob Esponja y Patricio han encontrado una pequeña almeja y deciden adoptarla y protegerla hasta que sea mayor.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: According to Dennis, ex-girlfriend Kendal refuses to let him go and keeps him around by lying about being pregnant. He wants to know if their daughter is even his! Will Steve's DNA test results finally let them move on?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Destiny is accused of being a pathological liar and faking her own pregnancy and miscarriage with her once boyfriend.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jessica can't make sense of her on again off again relationship with Wade and it's starting to drive her crazy. Wade however claims he's had nothing to do with Jessica and she's been spreading lies and stalking him for years.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Erica kicked her boyfriend Martez out of their house and life. But she's willing to give him a second chance if he proves that he didn't hurt her 4-year-old son! Then, Christy's ex Stephen refuses to admit that he fathered her son!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Robert believes his wife may have faked her pregnancy and the miscarriage just to keep him around! Demetrius thinks Nikki is lying to him and seeing other men on the side. Nikki wants to put these accusations to rest.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Kayla's madly in love with Levi, her baby's father, whom she's been dating for years. But this relationship is far from ordinary. A few months back, Kayla's 17-year-old sister accused Levi of taking advantage of her while sleeping.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Michael and Flora are no longer dating, but they have a 3-year-old daughter together. Michael thinks that Flora's boyfriend Dwayne is hurting his daughter. Is he telling the truth?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jake is here because he says that he knew he was in love with his girlfriend Lindsey the first time she ever asked him for a side of cheese. Then Shaina says she's in love with not one but two beautiful girls.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Chris claims that Brianna's very controlling and doesn't let him go out to do the things that make him happy. Then, Chad is here to propose to his girlfriend Star but before they book the caterer, Star has a little confession to make.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Bambi gives us a rare, honest look into her ultra-exclusive lifestyle in LA. Tiffany confronts C.T. over a rotten business deal.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jennifer caught her boyfriend and friend of 7 years in their hotel room and now she wants answers! Then, After 6 years, Ralph is finally ready to call it quits with his girlfriend. But she will give him a run for his money before she lets him go!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: The guests on today's show say they need to break free from their love triangles and fight for the one's they love.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Shell wants to come clean about her affairs with 3 separate lovers. Denise reveals that she’s cheating on her lover Becky….with a man!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Katrina says that her emotional needs are not being met, so she started cheating with Michaell. Then John explains to his girlfriend that he has recently acquired a female "indentured servant.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: John está siendo infiel a su esposa Destinee con Cici, pero Cici también tiene algunos secretos. Entonces, Lala suelta un bombazo a su novio. Además, Michael y su esposa Tayliana tienen secretos que revelarse mutuamente.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jaycee le demuestra a Brandy que nunca es correcto ser infiel y arruinar a una familia. Casi cree que su prometido podría aprender una lección de Kevin, un antiguo invitado. Además, concertamos una cita entre la espectadora Tamara y el invitado Nathan.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Anitra se entera de quién es realmente su pareja Kevin! Después, James está a semanas de casarse con Liz, pero tiene dos importantes secretos que contar. Después, Elliot dice que cometió el peor error de su vida al ser infiel a su novio, Rob.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: James está comprometido con Amanda, pero ahora confiesa lo de Melanie. Después, Jewel compite por el amor de su amante cuando Christa anuncia que lo quiere para ella.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Misty odia tanto al marido que se acaba de casar con su mejor amiga que está dispuesta a pagar el divorcio. ¡Lucus está dispuesto a divorciarse de su esposa de 6 semanas si su familia no deja de entrometerse!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Hope ha venido a enfrentarse a su mejor amiga, Laura, por robarle a su novio, Joey, y luego comprometerse con él. A continuación, John dirá que no tiene la culpa por acostarse con la mejor amiga de su novia.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Kenny vivía con dos hermanas, Lora y Misty, que también son sus amantes, pero las trata como sirvientas. Después, Jerry confronta a Kenny con los resultados de 9 pruebas de paternidad positivas, pero Kenny dice que solamente le importan 2 de sus 9 hijos.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Anita está dispuesta a dejar a su marido por su ex-amante. Luego Theresa está siendo infiel a su prometido con su hermano. Más tarde Kevin viene a decirle al ex de su novia, Jermaine, que se aleje.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Carl ha venido a decirle a su novia que se ha estado acostando con su peor enemiga, Keisha. A continuación, Donte le dirá a su mejor amigo, Quincy, que está acostándose con su prometida. Después, Janel y Nikkie están peleando por el mismo hombre.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Kiki y Kat eran compañeras de trabajo que se enamoraron. ¡Pero ahora Kat dejará a Kiki por un hombre! Después, Cedric viene a decirle a su novia que quiere llevar su relación a otro nivel... y a otra persona.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Fred engañó a su amante Jay, ¡así que ahora Jay quiere su merecido! A continuación, la obsesión de Terry por su panda de peluche está a punto de hacer que su novia se vaya. Después, Benny le dirá a su amigo que usa ropa interior de mujer en secreto.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Dave cuenta que los regaños constantes de su novia lo han arrojado a los brazos de una mujer de 72 años! A continuación, Joe está a punto de decirle a su hermosa novia que tuvo un rollo de una noche con alguien increíble.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Josh y Amy descubrirán hoy que sus parejas han sido infieles. Después Madeline le contará a Andre que ha estado acostándose con Diante. Después, Quincy está comprometido con Callie pero ella no sabe que Quincy ha sido infiel con Amy.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jen le contará a John que lo va a dejar por su amante secreto, Jerry, de 73 años. Después, Danika tiene una sorpresita para su prometido y se siente obligada a decirle que ella realmente es un hombre.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario contesta el teléfono pero nadie habla. Sonia le cuelga el teléfono a Fidelia y le pregunta con quien estaba hablando. Rodrigo lleva a Karina a su casa y queda en recogerla al día siguiente.

programme.desc: Mike and Frank are freestyling in Minnesota where they stumble on salvage operator Terry who has a staggering scrap yard. Everything is for sale, including a mother lode of retro signage.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Looking for roadside relics in West Virginia, the guys pick an Appalachian village museum where Mike ups the ante to score a rare retro motor. The museum's octogenarian owners.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Using muzzle-loading weapons from the revolutionary era, contestants compete in an old-fashioned frontier face-off. Meanwhile, a heated conflict in one team erupts and plays out in the elimination challenge.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Six weeks ago, three couples met at the altar and married as complete strangers. They were matched by experts, but now it's up to them to decide whether or not to continue their relationships. Will they stay married or opt for a divorce?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The three couples that were married at first sight learn about the importance of trust in their relationships. Will their marriages flourish?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Pawn Stars' "Old Man" Mr. Harrison stops by Count's Kustoms with a job that is as unique and old-fashioned as he is. Later, the guys aren't in love with Roli's new special custom project.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars have an opportunity to buy something they've never bought before--a helicopter! Can Rick convince the Old Man to come along and spin up a deal?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Adam and Caveman Rob head to South Africa to face the giant Bark Scorpion, the tiny Uroplectes Scorpion, and the highly venomous Lion Fish. Big pain comes in small packages, and the effects of marine animals' toxins are truly the next level of pain.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: When Corey has a chance to buy an extremely rare Belgium-made 1942 Sarolea motorcycle, Rick has a big concern...making money.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick has a chance to buy a little piece of militaria he's never had before--a Flame Thrower. Can he turn up the heat and coax a deal or will this deal go up in flames?

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Hoping to score big on the East Coast, Mike and Frank make stops in Virginia, DC, and Maryland, and are delirious when they find themselves waist-deep in a treasure-packed machine shop. Harry's property is wired for maximum security.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: While Mike and Frank pick the back roads of Minnesota, they challenge Danielle to sell a ten-foot fiberglass cowboy boot that's been gathering dust for over a year.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Danielle turns up a good lead she's been working on for months. When Mike tells Frank let's pack up for a trip to South Dakota, Frank says he can't.

programme.title: Road House
programme.desc: Patrick Swayze stars with Kelly Lynch, Sam Elliott and Ben Gazzara in this classic, action-filled tale of a cool but tough bouncer -- with a degree in philosophy -- at a Midwestern roadhouse who goes head to head with an insidious mob boss.

programme.title: Point Break
programme.desc: An F.B.I. Agent goes undercover to catch a gang of surfers who may be bank robbers.

programme.title: Bloodsport
programme.desc: Ninjitsu master Frank Dux journeys to Hong Kong to enter the Kumite, the Olympics of martial arts, and meets a beautiful American reporter. Before long he must face Chong-Li, a vicious Korean master of Tae Kwan Do, in a climactic fight to the finish.

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: A soft-spoken Vietnam vet drifts into a small town looking for no trouble, but finds it in the form of a psychotic local sheriff who finds pleasure in hating him for no reason.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: John Rambo is sent on assignment back to Southeast Asia to uncover evidence of still missing POWs, and ends up with his hands full when he comes up against Vietnamese soldiers still guarding the camps.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Rambo refuses to join his friend and former mentor, Colonel Trautman, on a mission to Afghanistan. The mission fails and Trautman is captured by Russian troops. Now Rambo must infiltrate the Russian fortress to save his only friend.

programme.title: Point Break
programme.desc: An F.B.I. Agent goes undercover to catch a gang of surfers who may be bank robbers.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Ben Fogle and Kate Humble hit our screens for another episode in this series of summer specials at the exotic safari park set in Wiltshire’s luscious rolling hills. Today, love blossoms in the park, but Cupid’s bow doesn’t always hit the right spot.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Kate Humble and Ben Fogle join more than 1000 exotic animals and the dedicated keepers looking after them at Longleat Safari Park for another serving of summer specials.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Ben Fogle and Kate Humble are back for the penultimate episode in this series of summer specials. Today, we explore the impact of alpha animals around the park, kicking off with the arrival of a hot new zebra stallion.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Ben Fogle and Kate Humble welcome new VIPS from Australia. But can keepers rise to the challenge of looking after koalas, reputed to be some of the most difficult animals to care for?

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Has handsome Harry, the pin-up boy of the Park, got what it takes to rule a brand new pride? Or will more than his beautiful face get ugly as he takes on eight feisty lionesses?

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes in Koala Creek as kidney disease claims the life of Wilpena and now keepers fear for Violet after worrying test results.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Keepers fear the worst as koala Violet goes downhill and the vet is called. And top Park star, veteran Iggy Pop the iguana, faces potentially life-threatening surgery.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Meet Inny the giant otter - the diva of the Park. Can keepers bring her to heel in time to be reunited with her old mate Gordito to avoid the risk of a clash of claws and teeth?

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Could love be in the air in Koala Creek, and has clumsy but loveable Dennis got what it takes to woo his trio of girls? But why is he bellowing and flirting with helicopters?

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Two snappy newcomers arrive at the Park – endangered Cuban crocodiles, reckoned to be the most ferocious croc in the world. How will keepers stay out of harm’s way?

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: There is trouble in Wolf Wood as one of the six cubs is seriously injured by the rest of the pack. As she goes into isolation for her own safety, her fate hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Red, the Amur tiger, is turning out to be a tear-away teenager so how can keepers hope to stop him from launching terrifying attacks on visitors’ cars and running amok?

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes the park's two rare wombats, the only ones of their kind in Europe. And which croc will triumph in the high jump?

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Will it be happy families or a brutal feud when Xena the abandoned cheetah cub is reunited with her mum and siblings?

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: Abducted in the trunk of her own car, a woman suffers unimaginable horror at the hands of her three captors.

programme.desc: Our love of Alaska, “America's Africa” is continued this season joining Mike Briggs as he hosts us at the Clover Pass Resort near Ketchikan, in beautiful Southeast Alaska.

programme.title: Anglers Digest
programme.desc: Plenty has been written, photographed, and filmed about the Florida Keys, and the epicenter of fishing activity that surrounds them.

programme.title: Anglers Digest
programme.desc: The South Pacific, a place so endearing in terms of the people, the fishing, and the diving, no place in the region can compare to Matava Resort on Kadavu Island.

programme.title: Anglers Digest

programme.title: Americana Outdoors

programme.title: Americana Outdoors

programme.title: Americana Outdoors

programme.title: Fishing Impossible

programme.desc: A ferocious 17-foot crocodile that refuses to move without a fight.

programme.desc: Three men tempt fate when they bring a buck, a buffalo, and a bull into their lives and homes.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: Two families are torn apart by one member's choice to keep big cats close at hand.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: An Australian man keeps two 10-foot saltwater crocs in a shed in his backyard. Aussie Vicky Lowing shares her suburban home with three pet crocodiles, one of whom she takes for drives in the car, another that lives in the bath.

programme.desc: A basketball star is booted out of the NBA when his on-court antics go too far, so he poses as a woman and joins the WUBA. Rated PG-13

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Tyra surprises the girls in a dance studio and teaches them how to work their fierceness while posing at the end of a runway.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models are spilt into two teams for go-sees with Shoshanna Lonstein, Pamella Roland and Stacey Bendit from Alice & Olivia.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The queens are challenged to perform in a lip-syncing dance number inspired by the legendary historical women. Fashion designer Jeremy Scott guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The queens' acting chops are tested in parody movie sequels of RuPaul's favorite movies. Pussycat Doll Nicole Scherzinger guest judges.

programme.desc: An Apache's stealth in tandem with tomahawks, knives, war club, and bow and arrow go up against a killing machine Gladiator's spiked gloves, trident, sica, and armor.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: As they venture deeper into their surroundings, the nine remaining survivalists realize that this terrain is unlike anything they've ever experienced. One participant suffers a serious injury.

programme.title: Alone

programme.desc: Don must find the hijackers of a truck carrying nuclear waste before they detonate a dirty bomb in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Without A Trace

programme.title: Without A Trace

programme.title: Without A Trace

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team members search for a male college student who vanished after making provocative, racist statements about African Americans to an acquaintance during a classroom discussion. Their investigation leads to the discovery of a family secret.

programme.title: Without A Trace

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When an ex-con who has recently been released from prison goes missing, the team questions whether her past mistakes, including embezzling money, may have come back to haunt her.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: A college student -- and former child prodigy -- receives a death threat and subsequently disappears while working in a mall as a department store Santa. The team tries to determine whether the student had been using his genius for criminal endeavors.

programme.title: Without A Trace

When a student writes the police code for homicide, 187, inside a textbook owned by teacher Trevor Garfield, he feels threatened.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Beast of the Bayou
programme.desc: The team travels to Eastern Washington and the Blue Mountains to meet with professor Jeff Meldrum where he discovered the tracks of a possible bigfoot. With accounts going back for fifty years, the team is optimistic about finding something in the woods.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Squatching in a Winter Wonderland
programme.desc: Flashing forward to the final night in OK it appears that our team has finally spotted a sasquatch. They use a cherry picker and some music to lure in the beast. Our team of investigators find themselves in very real danger during their final night.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Live to Squatch Another Day
programme.desc: The team travels to Alabama to investigate reports deep in the forests of what residents have dubbed Creepy Mountain. After examining thermal footage, they push further into the forest and break out a search technique designed for 'Bama bigfoots.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Bama Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team travels to Bobo's backyard, Humboldt County, to investigate strange photos of a possible bigfoot among the Redwoods. Confident Bobo lives among the bigfoots, the team heads deep into the Redwoods using heavy metal vocals as bait.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conflicto en el minimercado termina en riña de parqueadero. Un pasajero de auto descoordinado atrae la atención de la policía. Un sospechoso jura que fue hasta una tienda cerrada para leer su menú.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una mujer se pone nerviosa cuando trata de evitar a un oficial en bicicleta. Un policía investiga un robo de carro complicado. Los condimentos que escoge un hombre alerta a la policía con sospechas.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor ebrio se estrella en la casa de una familia. Una licencia suspendida no impide que un hombre lleve a su padre a casa. Un auto lleno de adolescentes es detenido en camino a una película.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Huyen los vehículos jugando carreras cuando llega la policía. Un conductor vacilón se ríe de su error. Una mujer fugitiva se preocupa más por su higiene oral que por su orden de captura.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un motociclista casi se mata después de estrellarse en una carretera oscura. En una parada, la policía pide información a los pasajeros. Un conductor joven admite que su situación no es favorable cuando la policía lo detiene.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: El cumpleaños de una mujer termina con una persecución a pie, esposas y muchas lágrimas. Un sospechoso dice que fue gratis. La abuela viene al rescate cuando un joven asustado es detenido sin licencia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor se escapa y finge ser un cliente de lavandería. Los planes de la fiesta se cancelan cuando un joven educado es detenido. Una mujer está angustiada porque el exnovio no la deja entrar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso en propiedad privada hace preguntas en lugar de responderlas. Los policías descubren una gran cantidad de contrabando durante un retén. Un adicto viene a visitar y la policía ayuda.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre desnudo y delirante está en el porche de su vecino. Un conductor trata de correr, pero deja los zapatos atrás. Una pareja tiene dificultad en seguir adelante después de un evento trágico.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una familia llama a la policía porque hay un extraño en su casa. La policía encuentra cosas desagradables en el coche del hijo de una señora. Las tensiones entre un joven y su padrastro llegan a su límite.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La posible sentencia de ir a prisión asusta a un sospechoso y huye. Los oficiales ayudan a unos padres a razonar. La policía intenta detener a una mujer furiosa que atacó a su exnovio con un martillo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se descubre el botín de un ladrón que insiste que lo iba a donar. Encuentran objetos ilícitos en el coche de un supuesto aficionado de beisbol. Muchos problemas vienen por tener vidrios teñidos.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un retén termina mal cuando un conductor que parece cooperar se irrita. Un delincuente de tráfico es capturado con más que una licencia suspendida. Una mujer problemática ignora el aviso de desalojo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una mujer desafiante toma una mala decisión mientras su novio no interviene. Una etiqueta falsa y una historia confusa no pasan la prueba de indagación. Un padre y un hijo pelean en público.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía enfrenta a una pareja en una parada de autobús y todo se complica. Él le llama a su novia para cancelar una fiesta. Se reportó que conducía ebria, pero ella jura que es una trampa del exmarido.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso de robo vuelve para apoyar a su socio en el delito. Una investigación de autos da lugar a persecución. Un tipo que admite haber consumido drogas dice que lo hace de forma responsable.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se persigue a un hombre en un ciclomotor chatarra que no corre más de 40mph. Una mujer culpa a su previa relación tóxica por lo que hay en su auto. Un conductor errático pone a los oficiales en alerta.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una persecución nocturna termina en el jardín de una casa y la policía busca pistas. Una mujer harta habla al grano con un hombre que evita la realidad. Un policía anima a un veterano con mala suerte.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor que huye forja su propio camino para escapar. Los oficiales aconsejan al comerciante de autos que invierta en más cámaras de seguridad. Un oficial separa un problema doméstico explosivo.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.desc: In an attempt to lure the sisters out of the manor, Zankou sends his underlings to attack Leo, in order for him to search the house for the Nexus and release the Shadow, the ultimate power.

programme.desc: Chris must come up with a school project for Earth Day, so he decides to collect cans, believing it will be an easy task and something Julius can help him accomplish.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Employed as a Sandman, Sabrina gets into trouble dropping into other people’s dreams.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: The Spellman house becomes the setting for a silent movie.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina and her aunts travel to Hawaii for a family reunion, but when they arrive, Sabrina discovers that she will not be able to enjoy herself until she solves the family secret once and for all.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: After losing a tooth, Scaredy makes the mistake of trying to trick the Molar Owl. Then, Scaredy discovers that mild-mannered Mildred has a secret.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Momma forces Scaredy and Nestor to team up for the Blasa Bathtub Race. Then, Scaredy loses Nestor's grandmother while taking care of her.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Dave becomes a stacking celebrity and his friendship with Scaredy suffers. Then, a treasure map found at the store leads to an adventure.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy ends up in a pickle! Then, Scaredy attempts to film a version of his favorite show.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Heloise is irate when Jimmy and Beezy find, steal, and flaunt her secret stash of dolls. --- Jimmy and Beezy dress up as pandas in order to bust Cerbee out of an animals-only jail.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Lucius launches “Heinous,” a height-boosting new fragrance. --- Jimmy, Heloise, and Beezy discover the exclusive Heinous Chocolate Reserve.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Heloise and Beezy have a secret, and Jimmy will do anything to find out what it is—even if it means taking dance lessons from Rudolpho.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: After breaking Lucius’s super-expensive vase, Jimmy and Beezy try to adjust to the outlaw life with notorious criminal Stink the Skunk.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: An experimental “genius bolt” strikes Beezy, making him smarter than everyone else in Miseryville-– including Heloise.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Beezy rebels against his dad’s wishes and befriends a needy weevil named Max.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Dr. Buttocks gets a map leading to the ancient, lost city of PacLantis, Pac, Cyli and Spiral voyage to the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Once every 100 Halloweens, the two moons of PacWorld turn blue, so Betrayus summons the sinister Count Pacula to drain the last Yellow Orb in PacWorld - namely Pac-Man!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: The diabolical Dr. Buttocks clones an army of radio controlled prehistoric Pacasaursto attack Pacworld.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: In order to learn the secret location of the Repository, Betrayus possesses his mother's body while Dr.Buttocks hypnotizes the President.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When a super gigantic Robot invades Pacopolis, wielding a weapon that renders the power berries powerless, Pac-Man faces the ultimate challenge and nearly succumbs to doubts that without the berries he is not really a hero.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: There's a new threat to PacWorld, a debonair spy ghost named Specter. To stop him, Pac gets help from an unexpected source.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Coop adopts a stray dog and trains him to defend against Kat. // Coop takes advantage of Kat’s fear of snow until Kat overcomes his fear and sabotages Coop’s sled ride down the deadly Demolition Alley.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: The police and OLM catch Coop and his friends waking the neighbourhood but they all have a very different story about what they think happened. // Kat builds a teleporter to steal seemingly insignificant items from the neighourhood.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Kat tires to relax in private but finds his nap encroached on by Coop and his friends playing Capture The Flag. // When OLM shows an unusual interest in Coop and Dennis’ favourite show, they become equally obsessed with finding out why she likes it.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: It’s time for the annual Bootsville Days festival celebrating the town’s founding. // Kat’s penchant for munching as he works on his secret rocket has him tipping the scales with rolls of flab!

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: After Coop uses cat whispering to make Kat into his new best friend, he becomes a pal to all animals. // Coop and Dennis join the school soccer team but Coop would rather show off than use teamwork.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Kat gets a transceiver stuck in his ear, making him highly susceptible to sound, especially Millie’s singing voice. // After Kat’s latest tantrum almost destroys the house Dad starts his own extreme renovation.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: As Phoebe competes in a televised singing contest, Kat tries to hack into the towns machines and Coop and Dennis destroy everyone’s satellite dishes. // Kat supes up Coop’s rocket, ensuring his success in the model rocket club.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Coop falls for Old Lady Munson’s niece Fiona, and Kat does everything he can to make Coop look like the juvenile delinquent Old Lady Munson claims he is.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: A Swiss exchange student is en route to billet with the Zillas for International Student Week.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: Rock is due to receive an honorary doctorate from his old alma mater.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: Willy realizes that he and Rock hardly spend any quality time together.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: After being humiliated by Buzz one too many times, Willy comes up with the fiendish plan of hiring Scoop.

programme.title: My Dad the RockStar
programme.desc: It's Rock's birthday and no one needs to know he's another year older but him.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail invites Devoin on her podcast. Jade decides to get plastic surgery in Miami, so Briana visits to coach her through her anxiety. Bar goes to court for his outstanding DUI charges. Leah's twins turn 11.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade gets plastic surgery but her recovery turns dangerous, and Briana tries to help her as the situation escalates. Ashley juggles even more when she finds out she has to suddenly move. Leah gets news that will help Ali be more independent.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade's recovery gets even rockier when tensions rise between Sean and her parents. Ashley and Bar make a tough wedding decision as he faces another court date. Leah plans a birthday party for Addie, hoping Jeremy can make it.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade plans to fly home, but Briana tries to convince her to come back to Orlando with her instead. Kail reveals heartbreaking challenges around a recent medical diagnosis. When Addie struggles with online learning, Leah makes a tough decision.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade recovers at Briana's house, but has to make a hard decision about her family. Leah tries to balance Ali and Aleeah's unique needs. Kail juggles three different coparenting relationships. Bar starts college while Ashley plans a birthday surprise.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Ashley and Bar grapple racist backlash. Kloie's behavior wedges a divide between Jade and Sean. Briana travels for surgery, but returns to something shocking. Leah meets her doctor in hopes of getting answers about the lump on her breast.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade's career is moving forward, but her relationship with Sean begins to slip. While Ashley prepares to receive her Associate's Degree, Bar's schoolwork hits a road black. As Leah's second ultrasound approaches, she braces for the results.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail faces a court battle with Chris. Bar's DUI resurfaces & threatens to ruin Ashley's graduation party. Leah finds out if she needs surgery on her tumor. After meeting with a lawyer about Luis' parental rights, Briana is left with some hard choices.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail files a lawsuit against Briana while Leah meets a new love interest. Sean hits a crossroads in his sobriety as Jade struggles in their relationship. After a low key wedding, Ashley and Bar hit the rocks and she considers ending things for good.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Briana goes on Kail's ex's podcast leading to explosive consequences. Kloie has a medical emergency & Jade must navigate solo with Sean gone, Ashley contemplates the divorce while Bar visits his mom in Ohio. Leah goes on a date but gets a shocking call.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: After Kloie's dental surgery, Christy drops a bomb on Jade. Briana goes on a family vacation but tensions between her and Javi boil over. Ashley navigates living with her ex after Bar returns from Ohio. Leah gets to know Jaylan.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Ashley hits her boiling point. Jade kicks Christy out before she goes to jail. Bri questions if both dads will be present for the first day of school. Leah gets an exciting invitation that could be a big step for her new relationship.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail uncovers a secret Vee & Javi have been keeping. Leah introduces Jaylan to the girls. Jade tries to create stability for Kloie, who is struggling in Sean's absence. Briana & Devoin use lessons from therapy to rebuild their co-parenting relationship.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade & Kloie reunite with Sean after 3 months apart. Stella has a medical emergency that Briana is forced to navigate without Luis. Bar's past threatens reconnection. Jaylan has a chance to move closer to Leah, but it's not what either of them hoped for.
